choices.A: The endpoint is constrained by its ability to handle simultaneous requests. Enable “scale_to_zero” on the endpoint to spin up additional endpoints quickly to handle the requests.
choices.B: The endpoint is constrained by its ability to handle simultaneous requests. Scale the endpoint horizontally by editing the endpoint workload_size from “Small” to “Medium” to increase the model concurrency.
choices.C: The endpoint is constrained by its ability to handle simultaneous requests. Define a rate_1imit on the endpoint to spread out the requests over the course of the day.
choices.D: The endpoint is constrained by the GPU. Scale the endpoint vertically by changing the endpoint workload_type from “GPU_SMALL” to “GPU_MEDIUM”.

questions.explanation_vi: Khi endpoint bị nghẽn do số lượng yêu cầu đồng thời tăng đột biến (độ trễ tăng cao nhưng tài nguyên phần cứng chưa đạt ngưỡng tối đa), việc mở rộng ngang bằng cách tăng kích thước khối lượng công việc (workload_size) từ Small lên Medium sẽ giúp tăng khả năng xử lý đồng thời (concurrency) của endpoint.

questions.question:
A Machine Learning Engineer is setting up a cluster for a deep learning training run, but has a number of settings options to choose from. Their cluster will be reused by other engineers on their team and their datasets vary in size from hundreds of MBs to hundreds of GBs. They need to choose a configuration that allows for performant, stable deep learning training without excessive costs.
Which configuration will do this?

choices.A: Using ML Runtime, use a moderate sized GPU VM for the driver and a variable number of memory optimized CPU VMs for the workers with autoscale enabled
choices.B: Using ML Runtime, use a large single node, GPU-enabled VM with auto termination set to 20 minutes to reduce costs
choices.C: Using ML Runtime, use a moderately sized CPU VM for the driver and a variable number of GPU enabled VMs for the workers with autoscale enabled
choices.D: Using Databricks Runtime, use a moderately sized CPU VM for the driver and a variable number of GPU enabled VMs for the workers with autoscale enabled

questions.explanation_vi: Cấu hình tối ưu và tiết kiệm chi phí nhất cho cụm máy tính chạy huấn luyện học sâu là sử dụng Databricks ML Runtime với một máy ảo CPU vừa phải làm nút điều phối (driver) và cụm máy ảo GPU cho các worker với tính năng tự động co giãn (autoscale) để tối ưu hóa tài nguyên chạy.

questions.question:
A Machine Learning Engineer is setting up Databricks Lakehouse Monitoring to issue alerts based on IoT sensors that monitor various water conditions at a high tech hydroponic farm. Specifically:• pH sensorso Records acidity/alkalinity on a logarithmic scale from 0 to 14• Pump status monitoro Records the current status of the pump as “on”, “off”, “maintenance”, “fault”, or “clean”• Electrical Conductivity (EC) sensorso Records nutrient level of the water as “very rich”, “rich”, “medium”, “poor”, “very poor”
What are the appropriate drift metrics for each of the given sensor types?

choices.A: pH: Kolmogorov-Smirnov (KS), pump status: Chi-squared, EC sensor: Jensen-Shannon distance.
choices.B: pH: Chi-squared, pump status: Kolmogorov-Smirnov (KS), EC sensor: Wasserstein distance.
choices.C: pH: Jenson-Shannon distance, pump status: Kolmogorov-Smirnov (KS), EC sensor: Chi-squared.
choices.D: pH: Jensen-Shannon distance, pump status: Wasserstein distance, EC sensor: Kolmogorov-Smirnov (KS).

questions.explanation_vi: pH là dữ liệu liên tục nên dùng kiểm định Kolmogorov-Smirnov (KS). Trạng thái bơm là dữ liệu phân loại không thứ tự nên dùng Chi-squared. Chỉ số dinh dưỡng EC là dữ liệu phân loại có thứ tự nên dùng khoảng cách Jensen-Shannon (JS) để đo độ lệch phân phối. Lựa chọn A chỉ ra đúng sự kết hợp này.

questions.question:
A Data Scientist is preparing a Spark ML pipeline on a customer dataset with numeric features age, annual_income, and transaction_count, each varying widely. Because the chosen algorithm requires inputs normalized to the [0,1] range, they need to apply the appropriate Spark ML transformer to these features.
Which Spark ML transformer should the Data Scientist use to scale all features to the [0,1] range?

choices.A: MaxAbsScaler
choices.B: RobustScaler
choices.C: MinMaxScaler
choices.D: StandardScaler

questions.explanation_vi: Trong thư viện Spark ML, class `MinMaxScaler` được sử dụng để chuẩn hóa các đặc trưng dạng số về một phạm vi giá trị xác định trước, mặc định là [0, 1].

questions.question:
A Machine Learning Engineer has a production AI model that predicts fraudulent transactions in real time. This model is integrated into critical business workflows and any downtime could result in significant financial loss and regulatory penalties. The engineer needs to deploy a new, improved version of the model to production to replace the existing model. The bank’s fairness policy requires that all transactions be exposed to the same model at any given time. Additionally, the deployment must meet the following requirements:
• Zero downtime: The fraud detection service must remain continuously available to users and downstream systems.• Immediate rollback: If the new model causes issues, you must be able to revert to the previous version instantly.
Which deployment strategy meets these requirements?

choices.A: Canary
choices.B: Rolling
choices.C: Shadow
choices.D: Blue-Green

questions.explanation_vi: Chiến dịch triển khai Blue-Green cho phép chạy song song hai môi trường độc lập, giúp chuyển đổi lưu lượng tức thì mà không gây gián đoạn (zero downtime) và hỗ trợ quay lui nhanh (immediate rollback) nếu xảy ra sự cố. Việc ngân hàng yêu cầu tất cả người dùng phải sử dụng cùng một phiên bản mô hình tại một thời điểm loại trừ giải pháp Canary (đáp án D).

questions.question:
A Data Scientist has been performing hyperparameter tuning using Ray Tune with grid search. After team discussions, they decide to switch to Bayesian optimization to more efficiently explore the parameter space.
Their current code is:
How can they implement this change?

choices.A: ![](https://cdn.examcademy.com/images/questions/1774839412867-313v9195.png)
choices.B: ![](https://cdn.examcademy.com/images/questions/1774839415031-skxlzqqm.png)
choices.C: ![](https://cdn.examcademy.com/images/questions/1774839417328-8kmomc7q.png)
choices.D: ![](https://cdn.examcademy.com/images/questions/1774839419470-cxsmmwa4.png)

questions.explanation_vi: Để thực hiện tối ưu hóa siêu tham số bằng Bayesian optimization trong Ray Tune, ta cấu hình thuật toán tìm kiếm thích hợp bằng cách truyền đối tượng thuật toán tìm kiếm vào tham số `search_alg` trong hàm điều phối của Ray Tune. Lựa chọn C mô tả đúng cú pháp này.

questions.question:
A machine learning engineer has implemented a numeric drift monitoring solution by examining trends in the summary statistics of input variables. However, the engineer's stakeholders would like a more robust monitoring solution.
Which of the following can provide a more robust drift monitoring solution for numeric feature variables?

choices.A: None of these can provide more robust drift monitoring than summary statistics
choices.B: Statistical tests
choices.C: Oversampling
choices.D: Correlations

questions.explanation_vi: Các kiểm định thống kê chuyên biệt (Statistical tests như kiểm định Kolmogorov-Smirnov hoặc đo lường khoảng cách Jensen-Shannon) cung cấp một giải pháp giám sát lệch đặc trưng số mạnh mẽ hơn nhiều so với việc chỉ so sánh các chỉ số thống kê tổng hợp thông thường.

questions.question:
A team is building a machine learning pipeline, which includes feature engineering, model training, model evaluation, and model deployment. Over the last year, the project has grown a lot, with multiple contributors working on it. Currently, they are manually testing their pipelines and functions. However, they are looking to build out a MLOps process and want to organize their unit tests.
Which approach to organizing functions and unit tests should they take?

choices.A: Organize functions and unit tests together in multiple notebooks, grouping them by feature or component.
choices.B: Write unit tests only after deployment to avoid slowing down development.
choices.C: Place all functions and their corresponding unit tests in a single notebook or script.
choices.D: Separate functions into dedicated modules and place all unit tests in a separate test suite or notebook.

questions.explanation_vi: Trong phát triển phần mềm và MLOps, thực hành tốt nhất là tách biệt hoàn toàn các hàm nghiệp vụ vào các module/tệp Python riêng và tổ chức tất cả các bài kiểm thử đơn vị (unit tests) vào một bộ test suite độc lập để dễ dàng tự động hóa và bảo trì.

questions.question:
A Data Scientist has trained a regression model using Spark’s MLlib to predict housing prices. The model needs to be evaluated to determine how well it predicts on a testing dataset. The Data Scientist wants to use a standard regression metric for the evaluation. They also want to evaluate the model with the least processing overhead required.
Which approach will suit their needs?

choices.A: Convert the testing dataset to a pandas DataFrame and use scikit-learn’s root_mean_squared_error function to calculate the root mean squared error on the testing dataset.
choices.B: Use the MLlib’s RegressionEvaluator with the metricName set to rmse to calculate root mean squared error on the testing dataset.
choices.C: Implement a Spark UDF to calculate the root mean squared error for each row in the testing dataset and aggregate these values to obtain the overall RMSE score.
choices.D: Use the MLlib’s RankingEvaluator with the metricName set to rmse to calculate root mean squared error on the testing dataset.

questions.explanation_vi: Để đánh giá mô hình hồi quy trên Spark mà không gặp phải chi phí chuyển đổi dữ liệu (serialization/deserialization) sang Pandas, ta sử dụng trực tiếp class `RegressionEvaluator` của Spark MLlib với tham số `metricName="rmse"`.

questions.question:
A Machine Learning Engineer has created a custom PyFunc model wrapper for a fraud detection system that needs to be registered in Unity Catalog under the schema risk_models in the production catalog. The model requires specific dependencies and must be accessible for governance and version control. The engineer is working on a dedicated cluster with Unity Catalog enabled, but the model registration is failing.
Why is the model failing to be registered in this case?

choices.A: The model signature must be provided, as Unity Catalog requires all models to have signatures.
choices.B: The cluster must be configured with shared access mode instead of dedicated mode.
choices.C: The PyFunc model must inherit from mlflow.sklearn.Model instead of mlflow.pyfunc.PythonModel.
choices.D: The model artifacts must be stored in DBFS rather than Unity Catalog volumes.

questions.explanation_vi: Khi đăng ký mô hình vào Unity Catalog trong Databricks, cụm máy tính (cluster) bắt buộc phải được cấu hình ở chế độ truy cập chia sẻ (shared access mode) thay vì chế độ đơn người dùng (single user / dedicated mode) để hỗ trợ phân quyền và quản trị bảo mật.

questions.question:
A Machine Learning Engineer needs to build a credit risk model using Databricks. Due to strict data governance, production data cannot be accessed from development or staging environments. To manage MLOps, the engineer uses a “deploy code” strategy with separate development, staging, and production environments mapped to different catalogs in Unity Catalog. The CI/CD pipeline automates environment transitions.
What is the primary architectural component promoted from staging to production to generate the final, production-ready model in this scenario?

choices.A: A containerized image of the complete inference pipeline, including feature transformations.
choices.B: The CI/CD-approved model training source code, which will be executed in the production environment on the full production dataset.
choices.C: The model version entry in the Unity Catalog that has been transitioned from the “Staging” to the “Production” alias.
choices.D: The model artifact trained and validated in the staging environment on a subset of the data.

questions.explanation_vi: Trong chiến lược MLOps 'triển khai mã nguồn' (deploy code), thực thể chính được chuyển đổi qua các môi trường là mã nguồn huấn luyện mô hình đã được phê duyệt. Mã nguồn này sẽ được chạy trực tiếp trên môi trường production để huấn luyện mô hình trên toàn bộ tập dữ liệu production thực tế.

questions.question:
A Machine Learning Engineer has trained a credit scoring model and needs to evaluate fairness metrics across different customer segments while maintaining different levels of granularity for business reporting. They need to compute metrics like precision, recall, and demographic parity at the individual feature level (credit_score_range, income_bracket) as well as intersectional slices (combinations of features). The model outputs are stored in a Delta table with prediction probabilities and actual default labels. The engineer wants to systematically evaluate model performance across these various feature slices and granularities.
Which approach will do this?

choices.A: Create Lakehouse Monitoring with slicing expressions for individual features and intersection conditions.
choices.B: Implement custom MLflow evaluation functions that iterate through all possible feature combinations.
choices.C: Use Unity Catalog metric views with dimensions defined for each feature and measures for the fairness metrics.
choices.D: Build separate Spark DataFrames for each slice and compute metrics using standard DataFrame operations.

questions.explanation_vi: Databricks Lakehouse Monitoring hỗ trợ cấu hình các biểu thức phân lát (slicing expressions) để giám sát các chỉ số chất lượng và hiệu năng (bao gồm cả độ công bằng) trên từng đặc trưng cụ thể hoặc các tổ hợp đặc trưng (intersectional slices) một cách hệ thống.

questions.question:
A Machine Learning Engineer is training a large-scale gradient boosting model using SparkML on a cluster of machines. The training job fails due to memory overflow on a single executor node after processing several iterations. The cluster resources are limited to executor nodes with 16 CPU cores and 64 GB RAM each. The engineer wants to continue training the model without changing hyperparameters or reducing the dataset size. They know Spark’s architecture well and want to take advantage of its benefits.
Which approach will allow the Machine Learning Engineer to solve this issue?

choices.A: Increase the number of executor nodes and replicate the entire model on each node, then implement data parallelism to train on different mini-batches simultaneously.
choices.B: Increase the number of executor nodes and implement data parallelism by partitioning the dataset across executors so each node trains the model on a subset of data.
choices.C: Increase the number of executor nodes and replicate the entire model on each node, then apply model parallelism to train different parts of the model in parallel.
choices.D: Increase the number of executor nodes and implement model parallelism by splitting the gradient boosting model across executors so each node trains a part of the model.

questions.explanation_vi: Khi chạy SparkML bị tràn bộ nhớ executor do kích thước dữ liệu lớn, ta nên tăng số lượng executor và thực hiện phân vùng lại dữ liệu (data parallelism) để phân tán tải dữ liệu đều hơn trên các nút phân tán.

questions.question:
A Machine Learning Engineer needs to develop fraud detection models with Databricks. They need to ensure seamless collaboration between data engineers and data scientists while maintaining strict governance, version control, and traceability as models progress from development to production. So, they need to choose the Databricks feature that will enable centralized model lineage tracking, cross-workspace access control, and automated synchronization of model versions with their training data.
Which Databricks feature will do this?

choices.A: Mosaic AI Model Serving for deploying models as REST APIs
choices.B: Unity Catalog for governing models via a centralized registry with role-based access
choices.C: Lakehouse Monitoring for tracking data quality and model drift
choices.D: MLflow Tracking for logging parameters and metrics during experimentation

questions.explanation_vi: Unity Catalog đóng vai trò là một Registry trung tâm thống nhất cho cả dữ liệu và mô hình trong Databricks, cung cấp khả năng truy vết nguồn gốc (lineage), kiểm soát truy cập phân quyền giữa các workspace và liên kết mô hình trực tiếp với dữ liệu huấn luyện.

questions.question:
A Machine Learning Engineer is building a Databricks ML pipeline to predict customer churn. The pipeline needs to include automated feature engineering, model training, evaluation, and deployment to a REST API endpoint using MLflow.
What is the primary goal of an integration test for this pipeline?

choices.A: To verify that the pipeline can process a variety of data formats, even if some stages are skipped or bypassed
choices.B: To ensure that the pipeline’s performance meets latency and scalability requirements under simulated production loads
choices.C: To monitor the model’s performance after it has been deployed into the production environment
choices.D: To ensure the pipeline runs with all components working together and data flowing correctly between stages

questions.explanation_vi: Mục tiêu chính của kiểm thử tích hợp (integration testing) là đảm bảo toàn bộ pipeline học máy hoạt động trơn tru từ đầu đến cuối, các thành phần (tiền xử lý, huấn luyện, lưu trữ) phối hợp chính xác và luồng dữ liệu truyền qua các bước không bị lỗi.

questions.question:
A Machine Learning Engineer is working with a Spark DataFrame containing 100 million rows of retail transactions across thousands of stores. Each store requires its own demand forecasting model using the same scikit-learn pipeline. They want to train and apply these models in parallel for each store without collecting the data to the driver.
Which approach will do this?

choices.A: Use rdd.mapPartitions() to iterate through each store and apply the model logic in Python.
choices.B: Use groupBy("store_id").applyInPandas() to train and apply the model per group using a Pandas UDF.
choices.C: Use pyspark.pandas to call .groupby("store_id").apply() and train the model on each group.
choices.D: Convert the DataFrame to a Pandas DataFrame using .toPandas() and loop through each store locally.

questions.explanation_vi: Phương thức `groupBy().applyInPandas()` trong PySpark cho phép chia nhỏ DataFrame theo từng nhóm (ví dụ: theo store_id), sau đó áp dụng một hàm Python/Pandas nguyên bản (ví dụ: huấn luyện Prophet/scikit-learn) lên từng nhóm dữ liệu một cách song song trên các executor mà không cần kéo dữ liệu về driver.

questions.question:
A Machine Learning Engineer has previously built a feature table for model training and inference using a batch mode approach:
They have been informed that they now require these features to be available in “real-time”, with latency on the order of a minute. Their manager has informed them there is now a Kafka stream from which they can stream live data, and they need to have this ingested and available for low-latency feature lookups.
Which change to their existing code will achieve this?

choices.A: Change the incoming_df to be a dataframe based on a readStream() from the kafka source, the write_table() method will provide a low-latency lookup on this data.
choices.B: Change the incoming_df to be a dataframe based on a readStream() from the Kafka source and publish the table as an online table with the streaming option set to True.
choices.C: Run a triggered workflow to ingest the Kafka data to a dataframe that they can use with their existing write_table() command.
choices.D: Create a custom pyfunc MLflow model which processes results of the Kafka stream for on demand feature calculation.

questions.explanation_vi: Để cung cấp các đặc trưng thời gian thực từ Kafka, ta chuyển đổi DataFrame đầu vào thành một luồng dữ liệu bằng `readStream` từ Kafka, sau đó ghi và đồng bộ hóa bảng đặc trưng sang một Online Table hỗ trợ tìm kiếm độ trễ thấp (low-latency lookup).

questions.question:
A Machine Learning Engineer is tasked with building an automated daily pipeline that updates a customer_features table in Unity Catalog. They have implemented a function, compute_customer_features, that returns a DataFrame with a unique customer_id as the primary key and want to ensure the latest feature values are merged into the table each day.
Which code snippet implements this requirement?

choices.A: ![](https://cdn.examcademy.com/images/questions/1774839439110-5nlzkbio.png)
choices.B: ![](https://cdn.examcademy.com/images/questions/1774839442477-gg5b5s1r.png)
choices.C: ![](https://cdn.examcademy.com/images/questions/1774839444840-yq3ynk4j.png)
choices.D: ![](https://cdn.examcademy.com/images/questions/1774839447935-nxp47w5g.png)

questions.explanation_vi: Để thực hiện cập nhật lũy kế hàng ngày (upsert/merge) vào một bảng Feature Store dựa trên khóa chính, ta gọi phương thức ghi bảng với chế độ `mode="merge"` như trong đoạn mã ở lựa chọn D.

questions.question:
A Machine Learning Engineer wants to use on-demand features to train a model. They have a Python UDF, which relies on data fetched from a FeatureLookup. However, in online serving, the pipeline falls when the lookup ID is not found.
Which solution will resolve this issue?

choices.A: Update the UDF so that it handles both NaNs and None values.
choices.B: Add a default ID when defining the FeatureLookup, so it does not return None values.
choices.C: Log the model correctly via the FeatureEngineeringClient, so it automatically evaluates on-demand features.
choices.D: Register the UDF to Unity Catalog, so None values are handled automatically.

questions.explanation_vi: Khi thực hiện suy luận trực tuyến (online serving), nếu ID cần tìm kiếm không tồn tại trong Feature Store, hệ thống sẽ trả về giá trị trống (None/NaN). Do đó, hàm UDF tính toán đặc trưng theo yêu cầu (on-demand feature function) cần phải được viết để bắt và xử lý các giá trị trống này một cách an toàn nhằm tránh lỗi sập dịch vụ.

questions.question:
A Machine Learning Engineer is tasked with implementing a simple solution, requiring as little code as possible, to monitor a regression model and ensure that the R2 score does not exceed a certain threshold. If the threshold is exceeded, the solution needs to send an email to a distribution list.
Which proposed solution meets the criteria?

choices.A: Configure Lakehouse Monitoring using the Inference profile type. Create a SQL Alert that runs on a schedule and evaluates if the R2 score in the profile table exceeds the threshold. If so, the Alert should send an email to the configured email notification destination.
choices.B: Configure Lakehouse Monitoring using the Inference profile type. Create a SQL Query that runs on a schedule and evaluates if the R2 score in the profile table exceeds the threshold. If so, the Alert should send an email to the configured email notification destination.
choices.C: Configure Lakehouse Monitoring using the Inference profile type. Create a Workflow that runs on a schedule and executes a SQL query that evaluates the R2 score in the profile table. Use Workflow If/Else condition to execute a Notebook Task that sends the email if the R2 score threshold is exceeded.
choices.D: Create a Workflow that runs on a schedule. The Workflow executes a SQL Query that calculates the R2 score. Use Workflow If/Else condition to execute a Notebook Task that sends the email if the R2 score threshold is exceeded.

questions.explanation_vi: Sử dụng Databricks Lakehouse Monitoring để tạo bảng profile thông số suy luận, sau đó thiết lập một SQL Alert kiểm tra định kỳ bảng profile này. Nếu chỉ số R2 vượt ngưỡng, hệ thống sẽ tự động gửi email cảnh báo mà không cần viết nhiều mã nguồn bổ sung.

questions.question:
A Machine Learning Engineer needs to develop a custom anomaly detection model that monitors the internal IT infrastructure of their company. The model takes in compute metrics, logs, and user data and generates a binary prediction. The engineer plans to deploy it as a Databricks Model Serving endpoint. In production there will only be one client calling the endpoint once every 15 seconds. Leadership sees the model as an important part of their operational improvement strategy so maintaining consistent, stable, low latency inference is a requirement while minimizing infrastructure costs. The engineer plans to deploy the endpoint via the MLflow Deployment SDK.
Which endpoint config for the MLflow Deployment SDK should the engineer select?

choices.A: ![](https://cdn.examcademy.com/images/questions/1774839444665-5odb17fp.png)
choices.B: ![](https://cdn.examcademy.com/images/questions/1774839446723-z5ygc8gp.png)
choices.C: ![](https://cdn.examcademy.com/images/questions/1774839449433-oxzh9hkq.png)
choices.D: ![](https://cdn.examcademy.com/images/questions/1774839451962-6zqf1cyl.png)

questions.explanation_vi: Vì hệ thống yêu cầu độ trễ thấp nhất quán (không chấp nhận hiện tượng khởi động nguội - cold start) cho một client gọi định kỳ mỗi 15 giây, việc thiết lập `scale_to_zero_enabled: False` là bắt buộc, kết hợp với kích thước tải `Small` để tối ưu chi phí hạ tầng. Lựa chọn B thể hiện đúng cấu hình này.

questions.question:
A Machine Learning Engineer needs to build a time series model. In Databricks, they have created isolated environments in different workspaces for development, staging, and production. To manage this model, they are planning on using a “deploy code” strategy. They are concerned that the model trained in development will not remain consistent across environments, due to differences in the dependencies installed.
What can they do to ensure that the model is trained with the same packages?

choices.A: Use the same Databricks Runtime (DBR) version across environments and define dependencies in a lock file that is installed as part of the job.
choices.B: Use custom init scripts that install the necessary packages as part of the job.
choices.C: Use MLflow to track the model parameters and metrics in development, then export the same training conditions in staging and production.
choices.D: Use Databricks Repos to store the model code and install the required libraries in the notebook.

questions.explanation_vi: Để đảm bảo mô hình chạy ổn định không bị ảnh hưởng bởi sự khác biệt về thư viện giữa các môi trường, thực hành tốt nhất là đồng bộ hóa phiên bản Databricks Runtime (DBR) và sử dụng tệp khóa thư viện (lock file như requirements.txt với các version cố định) để cài đặt cho các Job.

questions.question:
A Machine Learning Engineer is responsible for maintaining a fraud detection model deployed on Databricks. They want to implement a retraining pipeline that automatically starts when the model’s F1 score drops below a threshold or when input feature distributions change significantly.
Which two actions should the engineer take to implement this automated retraining? (Choose two.)

choices.A: Schedule a recurring query on the Lakehouse monitoring table.
choices.B: Use MLflow to manually log metrics and retrain the model offline.
choices.C: Set up a manual retraining schedule to run every week regardless of alerts.
choices.D: Configure these alerts to send webhook notifications that trigger the model training job.
choices.E: Use Databricks SQL to create alerts on model performance and data drift metrics stored in Delta tables.

questions.explanation_vi: Để thiết lập quy trình tự động huấn luyện lại mô hình dựa trên sự kiện hiệu suất giảm, ta sử dụng Databricks SQL Alerts để theo dõi các chỉ số lưu trữ trong Delta tables (E), và cấu hình các cảnh báo này gửi Webhook (D) để tự động kích hoạt Job huấn luyện lại mô hình.

questions.question:
A Machine Learning Engineer developed a dynamic pricing model in MLflow that requires values from the company’s cloud database to generate predictions. At inference time the PyFunc model uses the cloud provider’s Python SDK to retrieve the latest values from the database. The inference code works well in a notebook, but when the engineer deploys the model to Databricks Model Serving, they receive 401 errors saying the user is not authenticated when trying to access the database. The engineer deploys the code via the REST API with the following payload:
Their Databricks administrators store cloud credentials under a Databricks secret scope called “cloud_creds” with key “db_key”. These credentials can be used to authenticate to the cloud provider’s SDK.
Which change can the engineer make so the endpoint can authenticate to the remote database while avoiding storing the access tokens in plain text?
questions.explanation_vi: Khi triển khai Model Serving, ta có thể truyền các thông tin xác thực từ Secret Scope dưới dạng biến môi trường cấu hình cho endpoint bằng cách chỉ định đường dẫn bí mật dạng `{{secrets/scope/key}}`. Lựa chọn D biểu diễn chính xác cấu hình này.

questions.question:
A retail company wants to better forecast their sales of each SKU in every store in order to more accurately distribute their products. To achieve this, a Data Scientist proposes scaling their existing forecasting model to forecast individually for each combination of SKU and Store ID. They have a cluster with 12 executors available in order to execute this. The current model is written using Pandas and the Prophet library for forecasting, with a Python function that receives a Pandas Data Frame with historic sales data as a parameter to train the forecasting model.
For their next iteration, they want to improve the efficiency of this approach while using the least amount of effort and leveraging all available resources.
Which approach will do this?

choices.A: 1. Rewrite the function using the Generalized Linear Regression models available in Spark MLlib, which allows parameterizing to reflect a similar behavior to that of Prophet;2. Perform a GROUP BY on the Spark DataFrame with the training data to group by Store and SKU;3. Apply the Spark UDF to the grouped DataFrame with the apply function,
choices.B: 1. Use a Spark query to identify all combinations of SKU and Store ID;2. Run a loop through every combination calling the existing Python function using Spark repartition(12) function so it distributes across all available executors.
choices.C: 1. Decorate the existing training function with the @pandas_udf;2. On the Spark DataFrame with all training data perform a GROUP BY by Store and SKU;3. Apply the decorated function to the grouped DataFrame with the apply function.
choices.D: 1. Use Spark repartition(12) to scale across all executors;2. Run to Pandas to convert the repartitioned DataFrame to Pandas so it can run on the original existing function;3. Add the Store ID and SKU to the Prophet model as exogenous variables.

questions.explanation_vi: Để song song hóa hàm huấn luyện Prophet viết bằng Pandas trên Spark, ta trang trí hàm đó bằng `@pandas_udf` và kết hợp với `groupBy().apply()` của Spark. Đây là giải pháp hiệu quả, ít thay đổi mã nguồn nhất để phân tán công việc trên 12 executor.

questions.question:
A Data Scientist is building a product recommendation model that suggests additional items based on a customer’s current shopping basket for an online merchant. The model needs to access the real-time basket contents at inference time to avoid recommending items already in the basket. The model will be deployed using Databricks Model Serving. The data scientist now wants to implement real-time feature engineering to incorporate the current basket contents into the model’s prediction.
Which approach will do this?

choices.A: Create a custom pyfunc model that processes the basket contents as part of the model’s predict() method.
choices.B: Write basket data to a feature table and publish to the online store for low-latency access.
choices.C: Store basket data in a Delta table and configure automatic feature lookup during model serving.
choices.D: Implement feature preprocessing in a separate microservice that feeds the model serving endpoint.

questions.explanation_vi: Do giỏ hàng thay đổi liên tục trong thời gian thực tại thời điểm người dùng duyệt web, cách duy nhất để lấy thông tin giỏ hàng hiện tại mà không bị trễ là truyền trực tiếp danh sách giỏ hàng làm tham số đầu vào trong yêu cầu suy luận, và xử lý nó trong phương thức `predict` của mô hình PyFunc tùy chỉnh.

questions.question:
A Data Scientist is using Spark ML to train a model for detecting fraudulent transactions (1: fraudulent, 0: non-fraudulent). To maximize the model’s overall AUC (ROC) score, the Data Scientist wants to perform hyperparameter tuning on a Random Forest classifier. Due to budget constraints, the tuning process must be completed efficiently to avoid excessive compute costs.
Which approach will fulfill their needs?

choices.A: ![](https://cdn.examcademy.com/images/questions/1774839454843-pi09jeyl.png)
choices.B: ![](https://cdn.examcademy.com/images/questions/1774839457549-7fnhhwa5.png)
choices.C: ![](https://cdn.examcademy.com/images/questions/1774839460244-9lsjwftf.png)
choices.D: ![](https://cdn.examcademy.com/images/questions/1774839462975-1bdvuar1.png)

questions.explanation_vi: Để thực hiện tìm kiếm siêu tham số hiệu quả và tiết kiệm chi phí trên tập dữ liệu Spark, ta sử dụng thư viện Hyperopt kết hợp với `SparkTrials`. `SparkTrials` tự động phân tán các lần chạy thử nghiệm song song trên cụm máy tính mà không làm vượt ngưỡng tài nguyên.

questions.question:
A Machine Learning Engineer wants to deploy a new change to their existing model training pipeline for a social media app. Currently, they use the Databricks Feature Store to create a training set to train their LightGBM model, which is then used in a Pandas UDF for batch inference to suggest potential friends to users. They have updated the feature engineering pipeline to include an additional feature function, which now computes the number of mutual friends a user has.
Which test should they add to quickly inform them if something has broken in the test environment?

choices.A: Implement an integration test that runs the entire pipeline from feature engineering to model inference in the production environment.
choices.B: Add a unit test that verifies the new mutual friends feature function correctly calculates expected values on a fake dataset.
choices.C: Add a unit test that verifies the new mutual friends feature function correctly calculates expected values on live data.
choices.D: Implement an integration test that runs the feature engineering pipeline in the production environment.

questions.explanation_vi: Một ca kiểm thử đơn vị (unit test) sử dụng dữ liệu giả lập (fake dataset) là cách nhanh nhất và cô lập nhất để kiểm tra xem hàm tính toán đặc trưng (mutual friends feature function) mới viết có trả về kết quả đúng như kỳ vọng hay không, giúp phát hiện lỗi lập trình sớm.

questions.question:
A Machine Learning Engineer is implementing integration tests for an ML pipeline in Databricks. The current integration test runs the complete workflow but takes four hours to execute due to large dataset processing and extensive model training. They need to select an approach that will be the most effective for optimizing integration test execution while maintaining test reliability. The approach should also be based on MLOps best practices.
Which approach will do this?

choices.A: Run integration tests only in the production environment using full datasets to ensure complete accuracy of the testing process.
choices.B: Use small subsets of production-like data and reduce training iterations while maintaining the same pipeline structure and validation checkpoints in a staging environment that closely matches production.
choices.C: Skip the model training phase entirely and only test data transformations and API endpoints using mock model predictions.
choices.D: Replace integration tests with unit tests for each pipeline component to reduce execution time and focus on individual component validation in a staging environment that closely matches production.

questions.explanation_vi: Để tối ưu thời gian chạy của các bài kiểm thử tích hợp (integration tests) mà vẫn đảm bảo độ tin cậy, thực hành tốt nhất trong MLOps là sử dụng một tập dữ liệu con (subset) đại diện và giảm số lượng phân kỳ huấn luyện (epochs/iterations), trong khi vẫn giữ nguyên cấu trúc các bước và các điểm kiểm định.

questions.question:
A Data Scientist is training a complex gradient-boosted model for fraud detection. The model uses dynamic threshold tuning during training and generates custom visualizations of feature drift. To ensure reproducibility and collaboration, they need to programmatically track:
• Custom metrics (e g., adjusted_f1 for threshold variations)• Hyperparameters from nested configuration files• Drift visualization plots as PDFs
Which approach implements this tracking in MLflow?

choices.A: Enable mlflow.autolog() at the beginning of the code and rely on it to automatically detect and log custom metrics, parameters, and visualization files.
choices.B: Store hyperparameters in a YAML file, save metrics to a CSV, and use mlflow.log_artifact() to upload both to the tracking server as artifacts.
choices.C: Write all custom metrics and parameters to stdout during training and configure MLflow’s tracking server to scrape these outputs.
choices.D: Use mlflow.log_metric("adjusted_f1", value),mlflow.log_params(nested_config), and mlflow.log_artifact("drift_plot.pdf") within an active MLflow run context, while enabling mlflow.autolog() to capture model-specific metadata automatically.

questions.explanation_vi: Để ghi nhận đầy đủ thông tin thí nghiệm, ta kết hợp tính năng Autologging tự động ghi nhận metadata của thư viện học máy và gọi thủ công các hàm `log_metric`, `log_params` (cho cấu hình lồng nhau), và `log_artifact` để lưu tệp đồ thị dạng PDF. Lựa chọn D thực hiện đúng điều này.

questions.question:
A Data Scientist at a company with rapidly increasing sales has deployed a scikit-learn model in production, which is retrained weekly on a single-node cluster. During the most recent retraining, the job failed due to an out-of-memory error. Upon investigation, the Data Scientist discovered that the training data had increased to 700GB as a result of the company’s expanding customer base.
Which approach will reliably resolve this issue in the long term?

choices.A: Refactor the code to use the DeepSpeed library to shard the scikit-learn model across multiple nodes, enabling distributed model training on large volumes of data
choices.B: Refactor the code to use MLlib across multiple nodes, enabling distributed model training on large volumes of data
choices.C: Wrap the current model training code as a Spark UDF and apply it to the Spark DataFrame to distribute model training across multiple nodes.
choices.D: Increase the size of the current single-node cluster to handle the increase of data while minimizing the need for code refactoring

questions.explanation_vi: Khi kích thước dữ liệu huấn luyện tăng quá lớn (đến 700GB), các thư viện huấn luyện đơn nút như scikit-learn sẽ bị quá tải bộ nhớ. Giải pháp lâu dài và ổn định nhất là chuyển đổi sang sử dụng thư viện học máy phân tán Spark MLlib chạy trên cụm nhiều node.

questions.question:
A Data Scientist has created a sales forecasting model, named sales-forecasting. The model is deployed to a model serving endpoint with a schema. They need to invoke this model using Python and would prefer to use a SDK function to make the request.
Which method suits these requirements?

choices.A: Import the MLflow Deployments class and use the predict method and provide the endpoint and input parameters.
choices.B: Use the built in ai_query function and provide the endpoints and request parameters.
choices.C: Import the MLflow Deployments class and use the ai_query method and provide the endpoints and request parameters.
choices.D: Make an API request to the MODEL_VERSION_URI and provide the dataframe_split as the request parameter.

questions.explanation_vi: Thư viện MLflow Deployments SDK cung cấp API sạch để gọi dự đoán từ một endpoint phục vụ mô hình bằng cách tạo client và gọi phương thức `predict` truyền vào tên endpoint và tham số đầu vào.

questions.question:
A Data Scientist is building a propensity model for an e-commerce start-up. The company maintains 7GB of historical data and receives about 5MB of new transaction data daily. The goal is to generate daily purchase predictions for all users by 7:00 AM each morning. As the start-up is in its early stages, the data scientist must prioritize a highly cost-efficient approach.
Which approach should the Data Scientist take?

choices.A: Use a multi-node compute and leverage distributed frameworks like SparkML to train the model. The model can then be scheduled as a nightly batch job that runs on a multi-node compute.
choices.B: Use a single-node memory compute to build a model with libraries like scikit-learn. The model can then be scheduled as a nightly batch job that runs on a single-node compute.
choices.C: Use a single-node compute to build a model with libraries like scikit-learn. The model can then be deployed as an always-on REST API so that users can query the API to get the predictions whenever they want.
choices.D: Use a single-node compute to build a model with libraries like scikit-learn. The model can then be integrated into an always-on streaming pipeline, to ensure immediate processing of incoming data in order to meet the SLA.

questions.explanation_vi: Do lượng dữ liệu lịch sử rất nhỏ (7GB) và dữ liệu mới hàng ngày cực ít (5MB), việc sử dụng mô hình scikit-learn chạy trên một máy đơn nút (single-node) dưới dạng một job hàng đêm là giải pháp tối ưu chi phí và cực kỳ hiệu quả, không cần đến cụm Spark phân tán phức tạp.

questions.question:
A Machine Learning Engineer wants to implement MLOps. They currently have three environments: dev, stage, and prod. They have many private PyPI packages that they use to train their models, and they are concerned that their environments will not be consistent between dev, stage, and prod. The engineer needs to follow enterprise scaling and CI/CD best practices to ensure that their environments are consistent.
Which approach will do this?

choices.A: Define an all purpose cluster with the private PyPI packages installed, and use the same cluster config across environments.
choices.B: Define dependencies for each task in their job(s) running the ML pipeline using Databricks Asset Bundles or Terraform.
choices.C: Use the same DBR for ML runtime across environments and %pip install any additional packages at the top of the notebook.
choices.D: Use the same DBR across environments.

questions.explanation_vi: Để quản lý các gói thư viện phụ thuộc (bao gồm cả các gói PyPI riêng tư) một cách nhất quán giữa các môi trường theo chuẩn IaC và MLOps, ta nên định nghĩa cấu hình thư viện trực tiếp cho từng tác vụ trong Databricks Asset Bundles hoặc tệp Terraform.

questions.question:
A Data Scientist is building a machine learning pipeline to classify raw text using a Logistic Regression model in Spark using Spark MLlib's Pipelines. This pipeline has three stages: the Tokenizer (to split the raw text in tokens), a HashingTF (to transform tokens into hashes) and the Logistic Regression itself (to perform the classification of texts). The Spark DataFrame with the training data is called trainingDF and the one with the test data is called testDF.
In order to do this, they use the following incomplete piece of code:
Which option correctly states:
(i) The complete command to run model training;(ii) The complete command to execute the prediction on test data;(iii) The object type of the model object returned by the model training command.

choices.A: ![](https://cdn.examcademy.com/images/questions/1774839475648-8rqx8ou8.png)
choices.B: ![](https://cdn.examcademy.com/images/questions/1774839477735-r9r1tu2w.png)
choices.C: ![](https://cdn.examcademy.com/images/questions/1774839479911-d2y11q7e.png)
choices.D: ![](https://cdn.examcademy.com/images/questions/1774839481836-uo5n22jq.png)

questions.explanation_vi: Trong Spark MLlib, ta huấn luyện Pipeline bằng cách gọi `.fit(trainingDF)` trả về đối tượng `PipelineModel` (phiên bản estimator đã được huấn luyện), và thực hiện dự đoán trên dữ liệu kiểm thử bằng cách gọi `.transform(testDF)`. Lựa chọn B thể hiện đúng cú pháp và kiểu dữ liệu trả về này.

questions.question:
A Machine Learning Engineer is building an application that requires low latency data lookups in response to a user’s question following a RAG based search. They want to ensure their users can receive as recent data as possible for urgent requests, so data should not be more than a few minutes late. The underlying data is a large table that may contain hundreds of gigabytes of data.
Which data serving approach will suit their use case?

choices.A: Online tables with snapshot sync mode
choices.B: A fast database hosted in MLflow model serving
choices.C: Online tables with continuous sync mode
choices.D: Online tables with triggered mode and a time series key

questions.explanation_vi: Để phục vụ tra cứu dữ liệu đặc trưng có độ trễ cực thấp và dữ liệu cập nhật liên tục (chỉ trễ vài phút so với nguồn Delta), ta sử dụng tính năng Online Tables của Databricks ở chế độ đồng bộ hóa liên tục (continuous sync mode).

questions.question:
A Machine Learning Engineer needs to deploy a custom model using Databricks Model Serving. The model requires an external tokenizer file (for example, a vocabulary or pre-trained tokenizer) to function correctly. They need to ensure this tokenizer file is included with the model so it is available during model serving.
How should they package this tokenizer file as part of the model deployment?

choices.A: Include tokenizer file as part of the model’s software dependencies by adding it to the conda_env specification.
choices.B: Use the code_paths parameter in mlflow.pyfunc.log_model() to include the tokenizer file, assuming it’s part of the custom Python logic needed by the model.
choices.C: Access the tokenizer file directly from Volumes at model inference time, which requires pre-provisioning access to the Volume for every model serving endpoint.
choices.D: Use the artifacts parameter in mlflow.pyfunc.log_model() to package the tokenizer file, referencing its path in Volumes.

questions.explanation_vi: Khi đóng gói mô hình PyFunc tùy chỉnh cần các tệp phụ trợ bên ngoài (như tệp từ điển tokenizer), ta truyền đường dẫn tệp đó vào tham số `artifacts` của hàm `mlflow.pyfunc.log_model`. Hệ thống sẽ tự động đóng gói tệp này cùng với mô hình để sẵn sàng sử dụng khi serving.

questions.question:
A Machine Learning Engineer has deployed a fraud detection model in Databricks Model Serving to detect fraudulent transactions. The engineer wants to compare the model’s predictions with the actual fraud classifications from the Fraud Ops team to monitor model performance. The Fraud Ops team uses a unique transaction_id to investigate fraudulent activity and persist their findings to a fraud_findings table. The engineer enabled inference tables on the endpoint, but they are not sure how to map the models’ predictions to the Fraud Ops team’s classifications.
How can the engineer uniquely join the models’ prediction to the fraud_findings table with the fewest code changes?

choices.A: Store databricks_request_id returned from each model serving request and persist it to the fraud_findings table. Join the inference table with the fraud_findings table using databricks_request_id as the join key.
choices.B: Join the inference table with the fraud_findings table using timestamp_ms as the join key.
choices.C: Populate the client_request_id field with the transaction_id in the model serving request body. Join the inference table with the fraud_findings table using client_request_id (which contains the transaction_id) as the join key.
choices.D: Modify the model to include an additional input: transaction_id. Log, register and deploy the new model. In the model serving request body, add transaction_id as an additional input feature. Join the inference table with the fraud_findings table using transaction_id as the join key.

questions.explanation_vi: Khi gọi Endpoint Serving, người dùng có thể tùy chọn gửi kèm thuộc tính `client_request_id` chứa định danh giao dịch (`transaction_id`). Giá trị này sẽ được ghi nhận vào bảng ghi nhận suy luận (inference table), giúp dễ dàng join trực tiếp với bảng kết quả điều tra của Fraud Ops có cùng `transaction_id`.

questions.question:
A Machine Learning Engineer has a real-time fraud detection model deployed that approves or blocks millions of transactions daily. They need to deploy a new version of the model with improved detection accuracy to this high-traffic, business-critical application. Because any model downtime could result in lost revenue or customer dissatisfaction, the engineer must ensure zero downtime and minimal disruption for end users. Leadership also requires that any rollback to the previous version be immediate if issues are detected with the new model in production.
Which deployment strategy meets these requirements?

choices.A: Use a canary deployment by initially routing a small percentage of user traffic to the new model version, monitoring results, and gradually increasing exposure until all traffic uses the new version if no problems are detected.
choices.B: Replace the current production model with the new version during a scheduled maintenance window, notify affected users of potential brief disruptions, and prepare to reroute requests to a backup if failures occur after deployment.
choices.C: Use a blue-green deployment for the new model, maintaining two separate production environments (one “blue,” one “green”) and switching user traffic to the new version only after confirming it is healthy, enabling instant rollback if needed.
choices.D: Deploy the new model in parallel with the old version, monitor both for a set period, and then notify all stakeholders to manually switch over to the new version at a coordinated time.

questions.explanation_vi: Blue-Green deployment duy trì đồng thời hai môi trường sản xuất độc lập. Nó cho phép chuyển đổi lưu lượng tức thì mà không gây gián đoạn và hỗ trợ quay lui nhanh (immediate rollback) nếu xảy ra sự cố, hoàn toàn đáp ứng các yêu cầu khắt khe đã nêu.

questions.question:
A Data Scientist needs to perform inference on a continuously updated Delta table called sales_data using an MLflow-registered Spark ML pipeline model (catalog.prod.sales_forecaster). Predictions must be written to a Delta table forecast_results, which must be updated with low latency leveraging a cluster with three executors. They want to maximize the efficient use of their cluster when doing this.
Which approach will suit their needs?

choices.A: ![](https://cdn.examcademy.com/images/questions/1774839483735-xho9mp5h.png)
choices.B: ![](https://cdn.examcademy.com/images/questions/1774839485997-islxk2io.png)
choices.C: ![](https://cdn.examcademy.com/images/questions/1774839488257-zb4anriw.png)
choices.D: ![](https://cdn.examcademy.com/images/questions/1774839490386-f5kgw9tk.png)

questions.explanation_vi: Để chạy dự đoán liên tục với độ trễ thấp trên Delta Table nguồn thay đổi, giải pháp tốt nhất là sử dụng Structured Streaming của Spark kết hợp với mô hình đã huấn luyện chạy dự đoán song song dưới dạng UDF. Lựa chọn D biểu diễn chính xác cú pháp này.

questions.question:
A Data Scientist is training a model to predict whether a customer will purchase a new product. They are experimenting with many algorithm types (e.g., Linear Regression, Logistic Regression, Decision Trees) and hundreds of hyperparameter combinations. They are using MLflow to track their runs, but managing and distinguishing between runs has become difficult. They need an MLFIow technique that will organize and trace these experiments and that will follow commonly-accepted design patterns.
Which technique will fulfill these requirements?

choices.A: Log runs for each algorithm type to different MLflow Tracking servers to ensure the runs do not get mixed up.
choices.B: Use MLflows Automatic Logging feature to reduce the number of explicit log statements within each run to increase code readability.
choices.C: Use AutoML to automatically test a variety of different algorithms and models.
choices.D: Set each algorithm type as a parent run and use nested runs for different hyperparameter settings within that parent run.

questions.explanation_vi: Để tổ chức quản lý hàng trăm run thử nghiệm siêu tham số cho nhiều thuật toán khác nhau, mô hình thiết kế chuẩn của MLflow là tạo một Run cha (parent run) cho mỗi thuật toán, và khởi tạo các Run con (nested/child runs) cho từng tập hợp siêu tham số thử nghiệm bên dưới.

questions.question:
A Machine Learning Engineer needs to digitize millions of historical documents spanning 200+ years with vastly different handwriting styles, fonts, languages, document conditions, and paper types. To do this, the engineer wants to train thousands of specialized OCR models to extract text. The number of documents vary significantly. They need an efficient approach for this parallel model training task.
Which approach suits their needs?

choices.A: Use Scikit-learn’s ML library within a Pandas UDF to parallelize training across data partitions. Use groupby.applyInPandas.
choices.B: Use Ray map_in_batches to allocate resources based on the various sizes of models and data volumes.
choices.C: Use Spark MLlib with custom Spark UDFs to distribute across partitions.
choices.D: Use Spark for data preprocessing and orchestrate parallel model training jobs through Databricks workflows.

questions.explanation_vi: Khi các mô hình cần huấn luyện có kích thước dữ liệu và tài nguyên tính toán khác biệt lớn, việc sử dụng `Ray` với phương thức `map_in_batches` giúp phân phối động tài nguyên tính toán hiệu quả hơn trên cụm máy tính so với phân vùng tĩnh của Spark.

questions.question:
A Data Scientist is building a predictive maintenance model for a fleet of vehicles. They have two tables in their feature store:
A sensor_readings feature table with IoT data (e.g., engine_temp, oil_pressure) streamed continuously. This is a time-series table with vehicle_id as a primary key and ts as a timestamp key.A maintenance_logs ground truth table that records when a vehicle component failed. This table includes vehicle_id and the exact failure_ts timestamp.
The goal is to create a training dataset by joining sensor_readings to maintenance_logs to train a model that predicts failures. They want to join the feature data with the ground truth data to ensure point-in-time correctness and prevent data leakage during model training.
Which approach will do this?

choices.A: Perform an inner join on vehicle_id and select the sensor reading with the timestamp that is closest to the failure_ts, whether it occurred before or after the failure.
choices.B: Join the tables on vehicle_id and then manually filter to only include sensor readings that were recorded in the hour immediately preceding the failure_ts.
choices.C: Perform an “AS OF” join, using the failure_ts from the maintenance logs to look up the latest sensor reading values that were recorded at or before that specific timestamp.
choices.D: For each failure, calculate the average of all sensor readings for that vehicle on the day of the failure and join that to the maintenance_logs table.

questions.explanation_vi: Để thực hiện liên kết dữ liệu thời gian chính xác và tránh rò rỉ thông tin (data leakage) trong huấn luyện học máy chuỗi thời gian, ta sử dụng phép join thời gian (AS OF join / ASOF join) để lấy giá trị cảm biến gần nhất được ghi nhận tại hoặc ngay trước thời điểm xảy ra sự cố (`failure_ts`).

questions.question:
A Machine Learning Engineer has deployed a customer churn prediction model to production three months ago. The model serves real-time predictions via a Databricks endpoint with inference logging enabled. They notice declining model accuracy in recent weeks and suspect data drift in customer demographics. They need to implement monitoring to track model performance degradation and input feature drift over time.
Which monitoring profile type should they use?

choices.A: Custom profile - Create a hybrid monitoring approach combining snapshot and time series profiles to capture both baseline comparisons and temporal trends.
choices.B: Inference profile - Monitor the inference table to track model performance metrics, prediction drift, and input feature drift across time windows.
choices.C: Time series profile - Monitor the inference table using timestamp-based windows to track model performance and input drift over time.
choices.D: Snapshot profile - Monitor the complete inference table to compare current model performance against the baseline established at deployment.

questions.explanation_vi: Inference profile (hồ sơ suy luận) trong Databricks Lakehouse Monitoring được thiết kế chuyên biệt để phân tích bảng ghi nhận suy luận (inference table), giúp theo dõi các chỉ số hiệu suất mô hình thực tế, lệch dự đoán và lệch đặc trưng đầu vào theo thời gian.

questions.question:
A Data Scientist is tasked with developing models to forecast product demand. The company offers 5000 different product types, and the Data Scientist must generate weekly forecasts for each type. They have access to two years of historical purchase data and are given ample project budget.
For their next project, they want to build 5000 separate Random Forest models, one for each product type. They aim to train all the models as quickly as possible with minimal setup.
Which approach meets these requirements?

choices.A: Use the DeepSpeed library to distribute the data by product across different nodes to enable the parallel training of multiple models.
choices.B: Create a Databricks Workflow with 5000 tasks. Each task is configured to accept a product ID as a parameter which will then train a model based on the specified product ID.
choices.C: Leverage the pandas function API (Grouped map) to group the data by product type and apply a custom model training function to each group.
choices.D: Use the RandomForest method from MLlib. This will leverage Spark’s parallel processing capability to train 5000 different models.

questions.explanation_vi: Pandas Function API (Grouped Map) cho phép phân tách tập dữ liệu lớn của Spark theo cột nhóm (product type) và chạy song song hàm huấn luyện scikit-learn trên các executor một cách độc lập và hiệu quả, giảm thiểu chi phí phát triển và cấu hình.

questions.question:
A Data Scientist at an online gaming company is creating a model to predict player churn. The company currently collects terabytes of player activity logs daily, which are stored in Databricks and processed for daily reporting. The Data Scientist has completed feature engineering and the resulting data is saved as a Delta Table with a size of 500GB. They need to next build the model for the most performant and cost-effective performance for Databricks.
Which approach will do this?

choices.A: Load the feature data as a Spark DataFrame and train the model using Spark’s DeepspeedTorchDistributor on a multi-node Databricks cluster.
choices.B: Load the feature data as a pandas DataFrame and train the model using scikit-learn’s RandomForestClassifier on a multi-node Databricks cluster.
choices.C: Load the feature data as a pandas DataFrame and train the model using scikit-learn’s RandomForestClassifier on a single-node Databricks cluster.
choices.D: Load the feature data as a Spark DataFrame and train the model using SparkML’s RandomForestClassifier on a multi-node Databricks cluster.

questions.explanation_vi: Với dung lượng dữ liệu đặc trưng lên tới 500GB, việc tải về bộ nhớ đơn nút sẽ gây lỗi tràn bộ nhớ. Do đó, ta nên giữ dữ liệu dưới dạng Spark DataFrame và sử dụng thuật toán phân tán `RandomForestClassifier` của SparkML chạy trên cụm nhiều node để đạt hiệu năng cao nhất.

questions.question:
A data scientist is building a model to predict which communication channel (Phone, SMS, Email, or Post) is most likely to be effective for a given customer.
Which model type is suited to this task?

choices.A: Linear Regression
choices.B: ARIMA
choices.C: Logistic Regression
choices.D: Softmax Classifier

questions.explanation_vi: Nhiệm vụ dự đoán kênh liên lạc tối ưu là bài toán phân loại nhiều lớp (multiclass classification). Softmax Classifier là mô hình chuẩn được dùng để tính xác suất cho nhiều lớp đầu ra phân biệt.

questions.question:
A machine learning engineer is developing a recommendation system for online content. They are using the Databricks Feature Store to store features for training and inference.
Which unit test should they create?

choices.A: Test that Pandas DataFrame operations work as expected
choices.B: Test feature transformation functions
choices.C: Test MLflow Model Registry operations
choices.D: Test Feature Store lookup during inference

questions.explanation_vi: Một ca kiểm thử đơn vị (unit test) chuẩn cho Feature Store nên tập trung kiểm tra tính đúng đắn của các hàm biến đổi đặc trưng (feature transformation functions) để đảm bảo các đặc trưng được tính toán nhất quán giữa môi trường offline và online.

questions.question:
A Machine Learning Engineer has a large dataset with a customer_region column and wants to train separate models for each region, then generate predictions. They need to parallelize this group-specific model training process using Databricks and the Pandas Function API.
Which approach will implement this solution?

choices.A: Use collect() to gather all data and process regions using standard pandas groupby.
choices.B: Use groupBy("customer_region") and apply a training function with applyInPandas().
choices.C: Use foreachBatch() to sequentially process each region’s data.
choices.D: Use mapInPandas() to apply the training function across all partitions without grouping.

questions.explanation_vi: Ta sử dụng phương thức `groupBy().applyInPandas()` để nhóm dữ liệu theo vùng (`customer_region`) và phân phối chạy song song hàm huấn luyện của Pandas/scikit-learn trên từng nhóm dữ liệu một cách độc lập.

questions.question:
A Data Scientist needs to analyze drift detection results from Databricks Lakehouse Monitoring. The system has generated both profile metrics and drift metrics tables. The scientist needs to identify baseline drift in numerical features by comparing current data against a baseline from 6 months ago.
Which combination of table columns and values indicates baseline drift in a numerical feature?

choices.A: window_cmp pointing to baseline time window and tv_distance > 0.5 with any drift_type value.
choices.B: drift_type = "BASELINE", chi_squared_test.p_value < 0.05, and js_distance > 0.2.
choices.C: drift_type = "BASELINE", ks_test.p_value < 0.05, and wasserstein_distance > 0.1.
choices.D: log_type = "BASELINE" in profile metrics table with population_stability_index > 0.2 in drift metrics table.

questions.explanation_vi: Để phát hiện lệch đặc trưng số so với baseline, bảng kết quả giám sát của Databricks Lakehouse Monitoring sử dụng giá trị `drift_type = "BASELINE"`. Với đặc trưng dạng số, kiểm định Kolmogorov-Smirnov (ks_test) có giá trị p_value < 0.05 và khoảng cách Wasserstein lớn hơn ngưỡng (ví dụ > 0.1) biểu thị sự dịch chuyển phân phối có ý nghĩa thống kê.

questions.question: Feature drift occurs when there is a change in which element?

choices.A: The distribution of the predicted target given by the model
choices.B: The distribution of an input variable
choices.C: The distribution of a target variable
choices.D: The relationship between input variables and target variables

questions.explanation_vi: Hiện tượng lệch đặc trưng (feature drift / covariate shift) xảy ra khi có sự thay đổi trong phân phối xác suất đầu vào của các biến đặc trưng (input variable).

questions.question: Which of the following can be used to compare the relative prevalence of specific values in a single categorical variable between two datasets or time periods?

choices.A: Contingency tables
choices.B: Number of unique values
choices.C: Mode
choices.D: Jensen-Shannon distance

questions.explanation_vi: Bảng ngẫu nhiên (Contingency tables / chéo tần suất) được sử dụng để so sánh sự phân bố tần suất của các giá trị phân loại trong một biến cụ thể giữa hai tập dữ liệu hoặc hai khoảng thời gian khác nhau.

questions.question: Which of the following is an obstacle related to streaming machine learning applications?

choices.A: End-to-end fault tolerance
choices.B: Out-of-order data
choices.C: None of these
choices.D: All of these

questions.explanation_vi: Việc triển khai các ứng dụng học máy dạng streaming phải đối mặt với nhiều thách thức kỹ thuật bao gồm đảm bảo khả năng chịu lỗi đầu cuối (end-to-end fault tolerance) và xử lý dữ liệu bị trễ hoặc đến không đúng thứ tự (out-of-order data).

questions.question:
A machine learning engineer would like to compute predictions on inference data as it becomes available through the pipeline in microbatches. The predictions should be stored in a table for query later.
Which deployment strategy can the engineer use?

choices.A: Real-time
choices.B: Streaming
choices.C: Batch
choices.D: Edge/on-device

questions.explanation_vi: Chiến lược triển khai luồng (Streaming deployment) được dùng để xử lý dữ liệu đầu vào và thực hiện dự đoán theo micro-batch liên tục khi dữ liệu mới xuất hiện.

questions.question:
A machine learning engineering team has decided that they need to have predictions be made available for querying in continuous, equal-sized increments. A computation can be included in one of the increments when all of its feature values are in the inference Spark DataFrame.
Which of the following tools can be used to provide this type of continuous inference?

choices.A: MLflow
choices.B: Delta Lake
choices.C: Spark UDFs
choices.D: Structured Streaming

questions.explanation_vi: Structured Streaming của Spark cung cấp cơ chế xử lý dữ liệu liên tục giúp chia nhỏ dữ liệu suy luận đầu vào thành các lô nhỏ đồng đều và áp dụng mô hình để trả về kết quả liên tục.

questions.question:
A machine learning engineer has a machine learning pipeline where predictions are updated annually. The final prediction dataset contains millions of rows, and that dataset is irregularly accessed.
Which solution should the machine learning engineer use to maintain cost efficiency?

choices.A: Cloud-based object storage
choices.B: Cloud-based in-memory instance of a Spark DataFrame
choices.C: Cloud-based low latency database
choices.D: On-premises low-latency database

questions.explanation_vi: Với dữ liệu dự đoán quy mô lớn nhưng chỉ được truy cập không thường xuyên và cập nhật định kỳ hàng năm, lưu trữ trên các kho lưu trữ đối tượng đám mây (như AWS S3, Azure ADLS) là giải pháp tối ưu nhất về chi phí so với việc duy trì cơ sở dữ liệu hoạt động liên tục.

questions.question:
A machine learning engineer has registered a Spark ML model in the MLflow Model Registry using the Spark ML model flavor with UI model_uri.
Which operation can be used to load the model as a Spark ML object for batch deployment?

choices.A: mlflow.spark.read_model(model_uri)
choices.B: mlflow.pyfunc.load_model(model_uri)
choices.C: mlflow.spark.load_model(model_uri)
choices.D: mlflow.sklearn.load_model(model_uri)

questions.explanation_vi: Ta dùng hàm `mlflow.spark.load_model(model_uri)` để tải mô hình MLflow đã đăng ký dưới dạng đối tượng Spark ML gốc phục vụ cho các công việc dự đoán hàng loạt (batch deployment) trên cụm Spark.

questions.question:
A machine learning engineer is migrating a machine learning pipeline to use Databricks Machine Learning. The pipeline needs to automatically refresh its model each time it runs. The project is attached to the existing model model_name in the MLflow Model Registry.
They are using the following code block as part of their solution:
Which statement describes the impact of the registered_model_name=model_name parameter and argument given that model_name already exists in the MLflow Model Registry?

choices.A: It identifies the name of the logged model in the MLflow Experiment.
choices.B: It avoids the need to specify the model name in the subsequent required call to mflow.register_model.
choices.C: It registers the new version of the model_name model in the MLflow Model Registry.
choices.D: It registers a new model called model_name in the MLflow Model Registry.

questions.explanation_vi: Khi chỉ định đối số `registered_model_name` với tên mô hình đã tồn tại trong Model Registry, MLflow sẽ tự động tạo và đăng ký một phiên bản mới (new version) cho mô hình đó dưới tên hiện có.

questions.question:
A machine learning engineer is migrating a machine learning pipeline to use Data bricks Machine Learning. The pipeline needs to automatically refresh its model each time it runs.
They are using the following code block as part of their solution:
Assuming that this is the first time that the model is being run, which statement describes the impact of the registered_model_name=model_name parameter?

choices.A: It registers the new version of the existing model_name model in the MLflow Model Registry.
choices.B: It registers a new model called model_name in the MLflow Model Registry.
choices.C: It avoids the need to specify the model name in the subsequent required call to mflow.register_model.
choices.D: It identifies the name of the logged model in the MLflow Experiment.

questions.explanation_vi: Trong lần chạy đầu tiên khi tên mô hình chưa tồn tại trong Registry, đối số `registered_model_name` sẽ khởi tạo và đăng ký một mô hình hoàn toàn mới trong Model Registry với tên được đặt.

questions.question:
In order to connect an MLflow Model Registry Webhook to a Databricks Job, the Job ID must be provided to the code block used to create the webhook.
Which approach can be used to obtain a Databricks Job ID?

choices.A: The Job ID field returned in a query using the Jobs API
choices.B: The Job ID field in the Jobs page in the UI
choices.C: The Job ID field in the Job details section of the specific Job page in the UI
choices.D: All of these approaches

questions.explanation_vi: Mã định danh của Job (Job ID) có thể được tìm thấy dễ dàng qua giao diện người dùng Databricks UI (ở trang danh sách Jobs hoặc trang chi tiết của Job cụ thể) hoặc thông qua phản hồi từ Jobs API. Do đó tất cả các cách trên đều đúng.

questions.question:
A machine learning engineer needs a python_model to access a collection of files using its load_context operation. The collection of files being accessed by python_model.load_context needs to be saved when the model is being logged. A dictionary of the names and paths of these files is properly stored in my_dict.
The machine learning engineer has written the following incomplete block of code:
Which lines of code can be used to fill in the blank to successfully complete the code block to accomplish the task?

choices.A: artifacts
choices.B: None of these lines of code can be used to successfully complete the code block
choices.C: context
choices.D: model_context

questions.explanation_vi: Khi xây dựng mô hình PyFunc tùy chỉnh cần truy cập các tệp bổ trợ ở hàm `load_context`, ta đóng gói chúng qua tham số `artifacts` (là một dict chứa tên và đường dẫn tệp) khi gọi hàm log_model của MLflow.

questions.question:
A machine learning engineer wants to delete an active MLflow Model Registry Webhook with webhook ID webhook_id for a specific model.
They are using the following code block:
Which change does the machine learning engineer need to make to this code block so it will successfully accomplish the task?

choices.A: Replace list with delete in the endpoint URL
choices.B: There are no necessary changes
choices.C: Replace list with webhooks in the endpoint URL
choices.D: Replace DELETE with POST in the call to http_request

questions.explanation_vi: Để xóa một webhook thông qua yêu cầu HTTP, ta cần gọi endpoint thích hợp bằng cách thay thế đường dẫn `/list` bằng `/delete` trong URL endpoint của API Webhooks.

questions.question:
A machine learning engineer has developed the following custom model class with preprocessing logic to combine two columns:
However, instances of this class are unable to compute predictions.
Which set of changes will update the class so predictions can be computed while continuing to apply the preprocessing logic?

choices.A: Replace model_input.copy() with self.preprocess_input(model_input.copy()) in the preprocess_input method
choices.B: Remove the self.rf_model = rf_model line from the fit method
choices.C: Replace model_input.copy() with self.preprocess_input(model_input.copy()) in the predict method
choices.D: Replace self.rf_model.predict(input) with self.predict(input) in the predict method

questions.explanation_vi: Để đảm bảo logic tiền xử lý tùy chỉnh được áp dụng khi chạy suy luận thực tế, phương thức `predict` của mô hình PyFunc phải thực hiện gọi hàm tiền xử lý đầu vào `self.preprocess_input` trên dữ liệu đầu vào trước khi truyền sang mô hình dự đoán. Cụ thể, lựa chọn C thể hiện đúng thay đổi này.

questions.question:
A data scientist has developed and logged a Spark ML random forest model model, and then they ended their Spark session and terminated their cluster. After starting a new cluster, they want to review the featureImportances of the original model object.
Which lines of code can be used to restore the model object so that featureImportances is available?

choices.A: client.list_artifacts(run_id)["feature-importances.csv"]
choices.B: mlflow.spark.load_model(model_uri)
choices.C: mlflow.load_model(model_uri)
choices.D: client.pyfunc.load_model(model_uri)

questions.explanation_vi: Khi khởi động lại cụm máy tính và muốn khôi phục lại đối tượng mô hình Spark ML để xem thuộc tính `featureImportances`, ta dùng hàm `mlflow.spark.load_model(model_uri)`.

questions.question:
A data scientist set up a machine learning pipeline to automatically log feature importance data from a CSV with each run. They now want to view the feature importance data in Databricks.
Which location in Databricks will show this data?

choices.A: The MLflow Model Registry Model page
choices.B: The Artifacts section of the MLflow Experiment page
choices.C: The Artifacts section of the MLflow Run page
choices.D: The Data section of the MLflow Run page/span>

questions.explanation_vi: Tệp CSV lưu thông tin độ quan trọng của đặc trưng được lưu dưới dạng artifact của run sẽ hiển thị tại mục Artifacts của trang chi tiết MLflow Run tương ứng.

questions.question: Which MLflow operation can be used to log a plot that was generated during an MLflow run?

choices.A: None of these operations can accomplish the task.
choices.B: mlflow.log_metric
choices.C: mlflow.log_visualization
choices.D: mlflow.log_figure

questions.question:
A data scientist would like to switch from manually using MLflow logging to MLflow Autologging for all machine learning libraries used in a notebook.
They begin by adding mlflow.autolog() to the top of the below code block:
The data scientist is now trying to determine which line of code will kick off the MLflow Autologging process.
Which line of code within the above code block will start the MLflow Autologging process?

choices.A: mlflow.log_metric("training_mse", mse)
choices.B: mlflow.sklearn.log_model(rf_model, "rf_model")
choices.C: with mlflow.start_run(run_name="ML Project") as run:
choices.D: rf_model = rf.fit(X_train, y_train)

questions.explanation_vi: Khi autologging được bật bằng `mlflow.autolog()`, quá trình tự động ghi nhận tham số và metrics chỉ thực sự được kích hoạt khi hàm huấn luyện mô hình (ví dụ: phương thức `.fit()` của thư viện scikit-learn) bắt đầu thực thi. Do đó đáp án là D.

questions.question:
A data scientist has run the following line of code to create a Feature Store table:
Which statement correctly describes the data in the Feature Store table new_table?

choices.A: The data in new_table is the values in column customer_id from df
choices.B: The data in new_table is exactly the same as the data in df
choices.C: The data in new_table is the customer-related features from df
choices.D: There is no data in new_table

questions.explanation_vi: Hàm `fs.create_table` chỉ khởi tạo schema định nghĩa bảng đặc trưng trên Feature Store mà chưa chèn dữ liệu thực tế vào bảng. Dữ liệu chỉ được điền khi ta gọi `fs.write_table`. Do đó bảng mới tạo không chứa dữ liệu (Lựa chọn D).

questions.question:
A Data Scientist is training a binary classification model using LogisticRegression in SparkML on a large dataset stored in a Delta table. After fitting the pipeline, they want to evaluate the model’s performance using an appropriate metric and scalable method across the distributed test data using the SparkML API.
Which model evaluation strategy will suit their needs?

choices.A: Use BinaryClassificationEvaluator with rawPredictionCo1 parameter, but first convert probability predictions to binary predictions using a UDF to ensure consistent evaluation across different Spark versions.
choices.B: Convert the DataFrame to RDD and use MulticlassMetrics.confusionMatrix() to calculate precision and recall manually, as this avoids the overhead of DataFrame operations in distributed environments.
choices.C: Use the BinaryClassificationEvaluator on the transformed test DataFrame and specify the appropriate metric.
choices.D: Use MulticlassClassificationEvaluator with weightedPrecision metric since it provides more comprehensive evaluation than BinaryClassificationEvaluator for binary problems.

questions.explanation_vi: Phương pháp chuẩn để đánh giá hiệu năng mô hình phân loại nhị phân trong SparkML trên tập dữ liệu phân tán là sử dụng trực tiếp class `BinaryClassificationEvaluator` trên DataFrame kết quả dự đoán và chỉ định metric đánh giá (như `areaUnderROC`).

questions.question:
A Machine Learning Engineer wants to monitor the quality and stability of their machine learning model’s predictions over time. They have a Delta table, retail_inference_log, which records each model prediction along with input features, a timestamp, and (when available) the true label. They need to detect data drift and monitor model performance trends using Databricks Lakehouse Monitoring, ensuring that alerts are triggered if the distribution of predictions or input features changes significantly.
Which approach will set up monitoring for this use case?

choices.A: Create a monitor with the Inference profile on the retail_inference_log table, specifying the timestamp column and the columns for model inputs, predictions, and labels. Configure the monitor to compute drift and performance metrics over time windows.
choices.B: Create a monitor with the Inference profile on the retail_inference_log table, and specify a recent batch of production data as the baseline table for drift detection. Use this recent production data to compare against new data for drift and performance monitoring.
choices.C: Create a monitor with the Snapshot profile on the retail_inference_log table, so that metrics are calculated over the entire table each time the monitor runs and therefore is able to compare new values with previous ones to compute data drift.
choices.D: Create a monitor with the Time Series profile on the retail_inference_log table, specifying the timestamp column and including model input, prediction columns and the true label column.
