This will track drift in features and predictions over time, and model performance could also be tracked using a custom metric.

questions.explanation_vi: Để theo dõi lệch dữ liệu và chất lượng mô hình suy luận thực tế, ta sử dụng cấu hình monitor với hồ sơ `Inference` trên bảng log suy luận, chỉ định rõ cột thời gian, cột đặc trưng đầu vào, dự đoán đầu ra và nhãn thực tế để hệ thống tự động tính toán các chỉ số đo lường theo các cửa sổ thời gian.

questions.question:
A data scientist has developed a scikit-learn random forest model model, but they have not yet logged model with MLflow. They have created a model signature model_signature and a few example input records input_records.
Which block of code can be used to log all of this information?

choices.B: mlflow.sklearn.log_model(model, "model")mlflow.log_signature(model_signature)mlflow.log_input(input_records)
choices.C: There is no way to log a model signature.
choices.A: ![](https://cdn.examcademy.com/images/questions/1774853242198-opkfb4ib.png)
choices.D: ![](https://cdn.examcademy.com/images/questions/1774853244295-7l6ebl6e.png)

questions.explanation_vi: Lựa chọn A thể hiện đúng cú pháp của hàm `mlflow.sklearn.log_model` chứa đầy đủ các đối số cho phép truyền trực tiếp đối tượng mô hình, chữ ký mô hình (`signature=model_signature`) và ví dụ đầu vào (`input_example=input_records`) trong một lệnh gọi duy nhất.

questions.question:
A Machine Learning Engineer needs to deploy a model serving endpoint from a logged MLflow run in Databricks. They have registered the model in Unity Catalog and are now ready to deploy it to a Databricks Model Serving endpoint. They will deploy the model using the MLflow Deployment SDK.
Which constraint do they need to take into account?

choices.A: The endpoint name does not need to be unique.
choices.B: The config argument is optional when creating an endpoint but it’s recommended to simplify the setup process.
choices.C: The entity_version argument must be an integer greater than 0.
choices.D: The config argument is required when creating an endpoint because it can’t be updated later.

questions.explanation_vi: Khi triển khai mô hình lên Serving endpoint bằng MLflow Deployment SDK, tham số `entity_version` đại diện cho phiên bản của mô hình đăng ký được sử dụng và bắt buộc phải là một số nguyên dương lớn hơn 0 (Lựa chọn C).

questions.question:
A Machine Learning Engineer needs to set up a new enterprise-wide Databricks environment for more than one hundred machine learning practitioners. Key requirements include robust governance across all data assets clear project isolation, effective cost management, and streamlined MLOps for reproducibility and collaboration across diverse machine learning projects.
Which initial setup strategy should be implemented to meet these requirements?

choices.A: Establish one primary workspace and use legacy Hive Metastore table ACLs for data access control. Depend on Git integration as the sole mechanism for collaboration and versioning of ML projects allowing users to install libraries directly on all-purpose clusters that they manage individually or in teams.
choices.B: Implement multiple workspaces, potentially segmented by department or major project domains. Enforce the use of Unity Catalog for centralized data governance lineage, and discovery. Standardize ML model development lifecycle with MLflow Tracking and Model Registry, and implement cluster policies to control resource allocation and costs.
choices.C: Create a single large shared workspace for all users. Grant admin privileges to team leads for user management and rely on users to manually tag clusters for cost attribution. Encourage the use of shared notebooks for collaboration.
choices.D: Provision individual workspaces for each data scientist to ensure maximum autonomy and isolation. Use separate cloud storage containers per workspace for data and allow users to configure and manage their own clusters without restrictions.

questions.explanation_vi: Theo các thực hành kiến trúc doanh nghiệp tốt nhất, ta nên phân tách các môi trường/phòng ban thành nhiều workspace riêng biệt để cô lập dự án, sử dụng Unity Catalog để quản trị dữ liệu tập trung, chuẩn hóa MLOps bằng MLflow và áp dụng chính sách cụm (cluster policies) để kiểm soát chi phí.

questions.question:
A Data Scientist is building a MLlib Pipeline to classify customer data. The Pipeline needs to be executed in sequence one-hot encoding of categorical variables scaling of numerical features and training of a classification model. They need to decide to design their code so that these sequences of operations are executed correctly within the MLlib Pipeline.
Which approach will do this?

choices.A: The Data Scientist must define Spark User Defined Functions (UDFs) for each operation and provide them to the Pipeline as a sequential list, with the first element representing the last operation.
choices.B: The Data Scientist must write custom Python functions for each operation and provide them to the Pipeline as a sequential list, with the first element representing the first operation.
choices.C: The Data Scientist must define the transformer or estimator for each operation and provide them to the Pipeline as a sequential list, with the first element representing the first operation.
choices.D: The Data Scientist must write custom Python functions for each operation and provide them to the Pipeline as a sequential list, with the first element representing the last operation.

questions.explanation_vi: Trong Spark MLlib, các bước của Pipeline được cấu hình bằng cách truyền một danh sách tuần tự các đối tượng Transformer hoặc Estimator vào thuộc tính `stages`, với phần tử đầu tiên đại diện cho bước xử lý đầu tiên trong quy trình.

questions.question:
A Data Scientist is training machine learning models in a notebook and needs to track varying parameters, a key performance metric called team_metric, and a summary graphic using MLflow. They observe that the tracking isn’t working as expected, and review their logging code. For the logging part of their code, they have:
Why is the code is not logging according to their requirements?

choices.A: log_artifact is only possible for raw data not files.
choices.B: They needed to use mlflow.log_metrics for the metrics_dict instead of mlflow.log_params for metrics to be displayed in the UI metrics tab.
choices.C: log_artifact requires a path to a directory, not a file, so nothing was tracked for the image.
choices.D: Sklearn-flavor MLflow models do not support metric tracking.

questions.explanation_vi: Để hiển thị các chỉ số đánh giá hiệu năng (metrics) trong tab tương ứng trên giao diện MLflow UI, lập trình viên phải ghi nhận chúng bằng hàm `mlflow.log_metrics` thay vì sử dụng `mlflow.log_params` (chỉ dùng cho tham số cấu hình dạng chuỗi/số đơn trị).

questions.question:
A Machine Learning Engineer needs to implement a monitoring system for a production machine learning model in Databricks. They need to be notified immediately when data drift metrics exceed predefined thresholds.
How should the engineer set up alerting mechanisms for drift detection?

choices.A: Create a Databricks SQL query on the monitor profile metrics table, set up a Databricks SQL alert with threshold conditions, and configure notifications to send to email, Slack, or PagerDuty when drift metrics exceed the specified values.
choices.B: Configure Databricks Jobs with scheduled notebooks that calculate drift metrics using the databricks.feature_store.compute_drift() function, then use dbutils.notebook.exit() with alert parameters to trigger email notifications.
choices.C: Use MLflow Model Registry webhooks to monitor drift by configuring custom drift detection functions that automatically trigger notifications when statistical tests (like KS-test or PSI) exceed threshold values of 0.1 for numerical features.
choices.D: Set up Unity Catalog data lineage monitoring with custom drift detection rules that automatically send Slack notifications when upstream data sources show distribution changes exceeding 15% variance from baseline.

questions.explanation_vi: Để thiết lập cảnh báo khi phát hiện lệch dữ liệu vượt ngưỡng, giải pháp chuẩn trong Databricks là viết câu lệnh SQL truy vấn bảng chỉ số giám sát, cấu hình một Databricks SQL Alert với điều kiện kiểm tra ngưỡng và thiết lập gửi thông báo trực tiếp đến các kênh như Slack, Email, hoặc PagerDuty.

questions.question:
A Data Scientist is building multiple machine learning models for time series forecasting in Databricks using MLflow to manage experiment tracking. For each model run, they want to log:
• The window size and learning rate used for training• The model’s RMSE on a test set• A plot showing actual vs. predicted values as a PNG file
Which implementation supports this use case using MLflow’s tracking API?

choices.A: Use mlflow.start_run() to track the model run, then export the metrics and parameters manually to a JSON file and upload it as an artifact.
choices.B: Use mlflow.log_metric() for window size, learning rate, and RMSE, and store the plot in a model registry comment or tag.
choices.C: Use mlflow.log_artifact() for all items parameters, metrics, and plots, ensuring they are saved as text or image files in the artifact directory.
choices.D: Use mlflow.log_param() to log the window size and learning rate, mlflow.log_metric() to log the RMSE, and mlflow.log_artifact() to log the plot as a PNG file within an mlflow.start_run() context.

questions.explanation_vi: Lựa chọn D thực hiện chính xác các phương thức tương ứng của MLflow: dùng `log_param` cho các tham số cấu hình đơn trị (window size, learning rate), `log_metric` cho chỉ số hiệu năng số (RMSE) và `log_artifact` để lưu trữ tệp hình ảnh đồ thị PNG.

questions.question:
A Machine Learning Engineer is working on a project that requires processing 500GB of customer transaction data to build a recommendation system. They need to perform feature engineering, train collaborative filtering models, and deploy the solution to handle real-time predictions for millions of users across multiple regions. Finally, they want to select an approach that maximizes Databricks features and processing capabilities.
Which approach will do this for this use case?

choices.A: Use Ray for distributed data processing and model training then deploy with Spark Streaming.
choices.B: Use Spark MLlib for data processing and model training, then implement a separate real-time serving infrastructure.
choices.C: Use Spark MLlib for the entire pipeline, including data processing model training and real-time serving.
choices.D: Use Pandas and scikit-learn for feature engineering, then transition to Spark MLlib for model training and batch predictions.

questions.explanation_vi: Để tối ưu hóa hiệu năng xử lý phân tán trên tập dữ liệu lớn 500GB và tận dụng tối đa hệ sinh thái Databricks, giải pháp đồng bộ và hiệu quả nhất là sử dụng thư viện Spark MLlib cho toàn bộ quy trình từ làm sạch dữ liệu, huấn luyện mô hình cho đến chấm điểm.

questions.question:
A Data Scientist is developing a machine learning model in Databricks to process a rapidly growing dataset that is projected to exceed 100 GB with 200 attributes. The current single-node Python implementation using scikit-learn is experiencing significant performance bottlenecks during training. They need to determine how to best scale their model training process given their current performance bottlenecks and also future data growth.
Which approach will suit their needs?

choices.A: Implement the model using a SparkML wrapper around the existing Python code and run it on a single, powerful node to combine the benefits of Spark’s ecosystem with single-node simplicity.
choices.B: Migrate the entire scikit-learn codebase to a larger single-node cluster (vertical scaling) because it requires minimal code changes and is simpler to manage initially.
choices.C: Rewrite the model using SparkML and distribute the training across a multi-node cluster (horizontal scaling) to leverage parallel processing capabilities for large datasets.
choices.D: Continue using the single-node Python implementation but optimize the code by implementing more efficient algorithms and data structures, as this will eventually outperform distributed solutions.

questions.explanation_vi: Để giải quyết triệt để vấn đề nghẽn hiệu năng trên tập dữ liệu ngày càng lớn (vượt quá 100GB), giải pháp mở rộng ngang tối ưu là viết lại mô hình bằng thư viện phân tán SparkML để chạy huấn luyện song song trên cụm nhiều node.

questions.question:
A Machine Learning Engineer is designing an integration test for a machine learning system that needs to validate the interaction between feature engineering, model training, evaluation, deployment, and inference pipelines. They need to select a test implementation approach that follows best practices for comprehensive integration tests.
Which approach will do this?

choices.A: Implement property-based tests that generate random input data and verify that each pipeline component produces outputs within expected statistical ranges.
choices.B: Design a test that loads production data, runs the complete feature engineering pipeline, trains a model on the features, and evaluates model performance against baseline metrics.
choices.C: Implement component-level smoke tests that verify each pipeline stage can start up successfully and produce non-empty outputs when given sample data.
choices.D: Create separate unit tests for each pipeline component and run them sequentially to verify individual functionality before combining them and evaluating model performance against baseline metrics.

questions.explanation_vi: Một bài kiểm thử tích hợp (integration test) ML toàn diện theo chuẩn MLOps nên mô phỏng lại toàn bộ luồng hoạt động chính của hệ thống từ việc tải dữ liệu, chạy pipeline tính toán đặc trưng, thực hiện huấn luyện mô hình và đánh giá chất lượng mô hình thu được so với baseline.

questions.question:
A Data Scientist is developing a fraud detection model using a massive imbalanced dataset exceeding 100 terabytes. They have chosen SparkML’s Logistic Regression and need to optimize its hyperparameters. Due to the dataset size and the need for robust evaluation, they are considering different strategies for hyperparameter tuning and model selection within the Spark ecosystem. They need the most computationally and time efficient approach for tuning the SparkML Logistic Regression model and evaluating its performance.
Which approach will do this?

choices.A: Implementing a custom grid search using nested loops in PySpark, training the model on the full dataset for each combination, and evaluating with MulticlassClassificationEvaluator.
choices.B: Utilizing SparkML’s CrossValidator with a ParamGridBuilder and a BinaryClassificationEvaluator for distributed processing.
choices.C: Exporting the dataset to a single machine, converting it to a Pandas DataFrame, and then using scikit-learn’s GridSearchCV for hyperparameter tuning and evaluation.
choices.D: Manually trying different hyperparameter combinations and evaluating the model using BinaryClassificationEvaluator on a small, local sample of the data.

questions.explanation_vi: Để tối ưu hóa việc tìm kiếm siêu tham số và đánh giá mô hình phân loại trên dữ liệu quy mô lớn (100TB) một cách phân tán, SparkML cung cấp sẵn bộ công cụ tích hợp bao gồm `CrossValidator`, `ParamGridBuilder` và `BinaryClassificationEvaluator`.

questions.question:
A Machine Learning Engineer is monitoring the customer_region column, which is categorical, in a retail sales dataset using Databricks Lakehouse Monitoring. Suspicious about changes in regional sales patterns, the scientist needs to use an appropriate test from the drift metrics table to confirm if the distribution of categorical values has significantly changed compared to a baseline period.
Which approach uses Lakehouse Monitoring to detect drift in this categorical column as the scientist needs?

choices.A: Calculate the PSI (Population Stability Index) for customer_region and compare against a policy-defined threshold to determine significant drift.
choices.B: Use the Kolmogorov-Smirnov (KS) test, as it directly applies to categorical distribution drift.
choices.C: Evaluate drift by counting the total number of records in each region and checking if any counts dropped to zero.
choices.D: Examine changes in the most frequent category percentage and no other action.

questions.explanation_vi: Chỉ số PSI (Population Stability Index) là độ đo tiêu chuẩn được sử dụng để đánh giá mức độ lệch phân bố của các đặc trưng phân loại (categorical features) theo thời gian so với tập dữ liệu baseline.

questions.question:
A Machine Learning Engineer is building a model to predict sensor failures using historical sensor data. They create a feature table by aggregating sensor readings into 5-minute intervals, using sensor_id as the primary key and always taking the latest available values within each interval. During model training, they perform feature lookups without specifying any temporal constraints.
A colleague warns that this approach may cause data leakage. Is the colleague correct, and how should the engineer address this issue?

choices.A: The colleague is incorrect aggregating to 5-minute intervals eliminates any temporal ordering issues.
choices.B: The colleague is incorrect as long as the same aggregation method is used in training and inference there is no data leakage.
choices.C: The colleague is correct use point-m-time feature lookups with a timestamp_lookup_key to ensure features reflect only historical data available at prediction time.
choices.D: The colleague is correct switch to using the raw sensor data without aggregation and implement time-travel queries for historical lookups.

questions.explanation_vi: Việc truy vấn đặc trưng mà không ràng buộc thời gian có thể dẫn đến việc mô hình được huấn luyện sử dụng các đặc trưng được cập nhật sau thời điểm nhãn mục tiêu xảy ra (gây rò rỉ dữ liệu). Để khắc phục, ta sử dụng Point-in-time lookup bằng cách chỉ định thuộc tính `timestamp_lookup_key` (Lựa chọn C).

questions.question:
A Machine Learning Engineer needs to set up CI/CD for a new model from the Data Science team. The model is small with fast training so they use the recommended deploy code method. They need to decide what should happen when a pull request is made to the main branch from the dev workspace, triggering the CI/CD workflow. Both staging and production workspaces contain data for test execution. They want to follow the recommended process for the staging workspace as part of this CI/CD workflow.
Which approach will do that?

choices.A: CI triggers unit tests and integration tests in the staging workspace, and the model is copied from the dev workspace to the staging workspace; only model deployment, inference and monitoring are integration tested.
choices.B: CI triggers unit tests in staging workspace and integration tests in production workspace.
choices.C: CI triggers unit tests and integration tests in the staging workspace, including model training, validation, deployment, inference and monitoring.
choices.D: CI triggers unit tests and integration tests in the staging workspace, including model training, validation; with deployment, inference and monitoring left for production workspace.

questions.explanation_vi: Trong quy trình CI/CD chuẩn cho học máy, môi trường staging đóng vai trò là bản sao của production. Khi kích hoạt CI/CD, hệ thống cần chạy kiểm thử tích hợp toàn bộ các bước bao gồm huấn luyện mô hình, kiểm định, triển khai thử nghiệm và giám sát để đảm bảo tính sẵn sàng trước khi đưa lên production.

questions.question:
A Machine Learning Engineer has a current recommendation AI model deployed on a Databricks Model Serving endpoint. Their team has made a new model and has tested it in staging thoroughly. It is now ready to be deployed on their platform that has high traffic consistently throughout the day, every day. The engineer decides to choose the blue-green method of model deployment. They first configure the two models as different entities for the Model Serving Endpoint.
What is the next step?

choices.A: Use the AI Gateway Fallback feature. The first entity should be the old model and the second one listed should be the new model.
choices.B: Use the AI Gateway Fallback feature. The first entity should be the new model and the second one listed should be the old model.
choices.C: Change the percentage of traffic where the new model gets 5% of the traffic and the old model will receive 95% of the traffic.
choices.D: Change the percentage of traffic where the new model gets 95% of the traffic and the old model will receive 5% of the traffic.

questions.explanation_vi: Trong cấu hình phục vụ mô hình của Databricks, để thiết lập định tuyến dự phòng hoặc dịch chuyển lưu lượng theo chiến lược Blue-Green, bước tiếp theo sau khi thiết lập các thực thể mô hình là sử dụng cấu hình Fallback, trong đó mô hình mới (đối tượng chính cần thử nghiệm) được liệt kê ở vị trí ưu tiên số một, và mô hình cũ đóng vai trò dự phòng ở vị trí thứ hai (Lựa chọn B).

questions.question:
A Machine Learning Engineer is building a feature pipeline and model that requires some features to be computed with sub-second latency. These features depend on specific information about the user in the request, as well as other collected features that can be looked up with lower latency. The engineer is concerned about meeting the one-second latency requirement for feature calculation and about potential train/inference skew affecting model performance.
Which solution fits their use case?

choices.A: Use a custom pyfunc model registered with the FeatureStoreClient. Have a method to calculate the low latency features from all inputs to update the input feature dataframe at the start of the predict method.
choices.B: Use a streamed dataset of features to create an online feature table for low latency feature lookup, register the model with these features.
choices.C: Use point-in-time feature lookup tables to ensure data is not arriving before the output label to avoid data leakage.
choices.D: Use a custom database hosted inside a served model in Databricks Model Serving to perform feature lookups and calculations of the sub second latency features and return these results.

questions.explanation_vi: Để tính toán các đặc trưng có độ trễ cực thấp (dưới giây) dựa trên tham số đầu vào thời gian thực, giải pháp tốt nhất là đóng gói logic tính toán này trực tiếp vào đầu phương thức `predict` của mô hình PyFunc tùy chỉnh đã được đăng ký thông qua Feature Store Client.

questions.question:
A Data Scientist needs to manage data for wind turbines. During each day, they ingest signals from each turbine and store them in an aggregate Unity Catalog table. To identify turbines in need of repair, the Data Scientist runs a clustering algorithm over the numeric turbine data nightly. The model performs well, but the scientist is concerned the distribution of the signals may shift over time causing the model performance to degrade.
How can the scientist use Lakehouse Monitoring’s Kolmogorov-Smirnov (KS) Test metric to get alerted when the distribution of the signal deviates from the initial evaluation dataset?

choices.A: Set up a “Time series profile” monitor on the signals table. Track the consecutive ks_test metrics for the numeric columns over time. Set up a SQL Alert to send an email when the ks_test statistic is small (< .05) and the pvalue is large (>.90).
choices.B: Set up a “Time series profile” monitor on the signals table with the evaluation dataset as the baseline table. Track the difference from the baseline ks_test metrics for the numeric columns over time. Set up a SQL Alert to send an email when the ks_test statistic is large (> .15) and the pvalue is small (<.25).
choices.C: Set up a “Time series profile” monitor on the signals table. Track the consecutive ks_test metrics for the numeric columns over time. Set up a SQL Alert to send an email when the ks_test statistic is large (> .15) and the pvalue is small (<.25).
choices.D: Set up a “Time series profile” monitor on the signals table with the evaluation dataset as the baseline table. Track the difference from the baseline ks_test metrics for the numeric columns over time. Set up a SQL Alert to send an email when the ks_test statistic is small (< .05) and the pvalue is large (>.90).

questions.explanation_vi: Kiểm định KS so sánh sự khác biệt phân phối. Khi có sự dịch chuyển lớn, giá trị thống kê KS (ks_test statistic) sẽ lớn (biểu thị khoảng cách lớn giữa hai phân phối lũy tích) và p-value sẽ nhỏ (bác bỏ giả thuyết hai phân phối giống nhau). Do đó cấu hình SQL Alert gửi cảnh báo khi thống kê KS lớn và p-value nhỏ là chính xác (Lựa chọn B).

questions.question:
A Machine Learning Engineer needs to develop a custom PyFunc model that requires external configuration files and pre-trained weights stored in Unity Catalog volumes. The model needs to be registered in Unity Catalog with the catalog name production, schema ml_models, and model name text_classifier. The engineer has the necessary USE CATALOG, USE SCHEMA, and CREATE MODEL privileges on the target schema. The configuration file is located at /Volumes/production/ml_models/configs/model_config.json and the weights file is at /Volumes/production/ml_models/weights/model.pk1. They need to log the custom PyFunc model with the required artifacts and register it to Unity Catalog.
Which code approach does this?

choices.A: Use mlflow.pyfunc.log_model() with the registered_model_name parameter set to the three-level name and include artifacts in the log_model call.
choices.B: Use mlflow.sklearn.log_model() with custom artifacts, then register using mlflow.set_registry_uri(“databricks-uc”) before registration.
choices.C: Use mlflow.pyfunc.log_model() with the artifacts parameter to include both files, then call mlflow.register_model() with the three-level model name.
choices.D: Use mlflow.pyfunc.save_model() with artifacts parameter, then call mlflow.models.register_model() with Unity Catalog URI.

questions.explanation_vi: Trong Databricks với Unity Catalog, để log và đăng ký trực tiếp một mô hình PyFunc tùy chỉnh cùng các artifacts đi kèm, ta gọi hàm `mlflow.pyfunc.log_model()` và đặt tham số `registered_model_name` bằng định danh 3 phần của Unity Catalog (catalog.schema.model_name) như ở lựa chọn A.

questions.question:
A Data Scientist wants to use fine-grained forecasting to predict the energy consumption of their clients by type (i.e. residential, industry, commercial, and others) and location, at a district level. The data scientist already has a model built using scikit-learn that was tested using a small subset of data, and would like to apply this model for this fine-grained forecasting. They have a cluster with eight executors available in order to execute this.
The existing function is called forecast_consumption and the Spark DataFrame containing the historic data is called history_df, with the client_type column for client types and district_id column for district ID.
Which code block would correctly perform this task with the smallest amount of effort and utilizing all available resources?

choices.A: ![](https://cdn.examcademy.com/images/questions/1774859748760-h5mxivo9.png)
choices.B: ![](https://cdn.examcademy.com/images/questions/1774859751733-4ykbsqsc.png)
choices.C: ![](https://cdn.examcademy.com/images/questions/1774859754200-z0w99auj.png)
choices.D: ![](https://cdn.examcademy.com/images/questions/1774859757064-tul9xs1d.png)

questions.explanation_vi: Lựa chọn A chứa đoạn mã chuẩn sử dụng phương thức `applyInPandas` kết hợp với cấu trúc phân nhóm `groupBy` để phân phối huấn luyện song song mô hình scikit-learn dự báo năng lượng tiêu thụ theo loại khách hàng và quận huyện trên 8 executor.

questions.question:
A Data Scientist is building a set of models to predict small IoT device sensor failures in a large manufacturing plant. Explicitly, the task is to predict if the sensor will fail in the next 7 days given the current and recent status of the sensor. There are hundreds of these sensors across the plant, with distinct profiles that require training a model per sensor. Individually, each sensor’s dataset is small, but combined they are big data. Experiments on individual sensor datasets have shown that a simple linear model has excellent predictive power on this task. The Data Scientist needs to define an approach to training and prediction that is efficient and follows best practices.
Which approach will suit their use case?

choices.A: Use applyInPandas to train a model per sensor, and mapInPandas to make predictions once in production.
choices.B: Use mapInPandas to train a model per sensor, and applyInPandas to make predictions once in production.
choices.C: Use a pandas_UDF to train a model per sensor, and applyInPandas to make predictions once in production.
choices.D: Use applyInPandas to tram a model per sensor, and a pandas_UDF to make predictions once in production.

questions.explanation_vi: Để huấn luyện mô hình riêng lẻ cho từng cảm biến trên tập dữ liệu tương đối nhỏ, việc nhóm dữ liệu và dùng `applyInPandas` là cách chuẩn để trả về các mô hình đã được huấn luyện. Khi đưa vào sản xuất để chạy dự đoán hàng loạt với hiệu năng cao cho dữ liệu lớn, việc định nghĩa một `pandas_UDF` để chạy mô hình sẽ tối ưu hóa việc phân tán tính toán trên Spark (Lựa chọn D).

questions.question:
A Machine Learning Engineer is developing a real-time fraud detection pipeline in Databricks. The current pipeline uses historical transaction features stored in the Databricks Feature Store and serves a trained model using MLflow and Databricks Model Serving.
The business team now requests adding dynamic, recent-event-based features, such as the number of suspicious transactions in the last 5 minutes, to improve model accuracy. These features must be computed and served efficiently at inference time. The engineer uses the Databricks Feature Engineering client to define transformation logic and logs the model with MLflow. They need to incorporate these dynamic features into the inference pipeline using the Databricks Feature Store. They also need to ensure low latency and their approach should conform to Databricks best practices.
Which approach will fulfill their requirements?

choices.A: Store the dynamic features in a separate real-time database and query them during inference, combining them with Feature Store features manually in the serving layer.
choices.B: Define custom transformation functions using the Databricks Feature Engineering client, register them with the Feature Store, and log the model with MLflow.
choices.C: Backfill the custom dynamic features into the Feature Store using batch jobs after each inference so they are available for future predictions.
choices.D: Persist raw transaction events in a Delta table and use model serving’s memory or local feature cache to join them with historical features at inference time using custom logic.

questions.explanation_vi: Để phục vụ các đặc trưng động tính toán thời gian thực (như số giao dịch trong 5 phút qua), thực hành tốt nhất là định nghĩa các hàm biến đổi đặc trưng sử dụng Feature Engineering Client, đăng ký chúng dưới dạng Feature Functions trong Feature Store và tích hợp trực tiếp khi log mô hình với MLflow.

questions.question:
A Machine Learning Engineer needs to create monitors for different types of tables in their Databricks environment. Specifically, they need to create a monitor on an inference table that tracks model performance for a classification problem.
They have an inference table named ml_models.production.credit_risk_predictions that contains the following columns:
• request_timestamp: timestamp of each prediction request• customer_features: input features for the model• predicted_risk_score: model predictions• actual_default: ground truth labels (optional)• model_version: identifier for the model version used
Which code snippet correctly creates an InferenceLog monitor for this table?

choices.A: ![](https://cdn.examcademy.com/images/questions/1774859752941-051dnlcx.png)
choices.B: ![](https://cdn.examcademy.com/images/questions/1774859755814-8m3idn1h.png)
choices.C: ![](https://cdn.examcademy.com/images/questions/1774859758550-ixc9xahd.png)
choices.D: ![](https://cdn.examcademy.com/images/questions/1774859761199-zf21909x.png)

questions.explanation_vi: Lựa chọn C chứa đoạn mã chính xác sử dụng `create_monitor` của Databricks Lakehouse Monitoring với kiểu hồ sơ `InferenceLog`, trong đó ta chỉ định rõ các thuộc tính tương ứng như cột thời gian yêu cầu, cột chứa đặc trưng đầu vào, cột giá trị dự đoán, và nhãn mục tiêu thực tế.

questions.question:
A Data Scientist is creating a forecasting system to predict snack sales for each flavor-location combination using independent, dedicated models. Training with scikit-learn and Pandas on a single machine resulted in Out-of-Memory errors and excessive runtime. They now have access to a large Databricks cluster and need to select the appropriate parallelization strategy to address these problems.
Which approach will do this?

choices.A: Data parallelization, using Pandas API on Spark to train all models simultaneously, leveraging Spark’s automatic parameter synchronization across data partitions
choices.B: Model parallelization, using Spark MLlib’s distributed algorithms to train a single comprehensive model for all flavors and point-of-sales across the cluster
choices.C: Data parallelization, using Spark’s groupBy().applyInPandas() to split individual model parameters across executors, allowing distributed training of each model’s components
choices.D: Model parallelization, using Spark’s groupBy().applyInPandas() with the existing scikit-learn model wrapped in a Pandas UDF to train each model on its data subset in parallel

questions.explanation_vi: Việc song song hóa huấn luyện nhiều mô hình độc lập (cho từng cặp hương vị - địa điểm) bằng cách sử dụng `groupBy().applyInPandas()` được gọi là chiến lược song song hóa mô hình (Model parallelization), cho phép phân phối việc chạy mã huấn luyện scikit-learn trên các phân vùng dữ liệu song song (Lựa chọn D).

questions.question:
A Machine Learning Engineer is preparing a script to score a large batch of customer data using a SparkML RandomForestClassificationModel registered in Unity Catalog. They want to use the commonly accepted coding best practices for this model.
Which approach will suit their needs?

choices.A: Load the model using MLflow’s mlflow.spark.load_model method, then perform batch predictions with RandomForestClassificationModel.transform().
choices.B: Provide the URI of the registered Unity Catalog model to Spark’s DataFrame predict method to perform batch predictions.
choices.C: Load the model using MLflow’s mlflow.pyfunc.spark_udf method, then perform batch predictions with RandomForestClassificationModel.transform().
choices.D: Provide the URI of the registered Unity Catalog model to the Databricks ai_query function to perform batch predictions.

questions.explanation_vi: Theo các thực hành lập trình chuẩn cho SparkML, để thực hiện dự đoán hàng loạt trên Spark DataFrame, ta tải mô hình SparkML bằng hàm `mlflow.spark.load_model` rồi áp dụng phương thức `.transform()` của đối tượng mô hình nhận được (Lựa chọn A).

questions.question:
A Machine Learning Engineer is monitoring a Databricks model serving endpoint that has started showing occasional latency spikes during high traffic periods. The engineer uses the Databricks metrics export API to collect latency percentiles (P50, P99). The goal is to use these metrics to detect and diagnose performance issues.
How should the engineer use these latency metrics to gain insight into endpoint performance?

choices.A: Compare P50 and P99 latency to assess both typical and worst-case response times, investigating when P99 latency diverges from P50.
choices.B: Analyze average latency values to summarize overall performance and check for increases during high traffic periods.
choices.C: Review P50 latency to evaluate the most common response time and correlate this with changes in request rate.
choices.D: Monitor P99 latency to focus on the slowest responses and use this to determine if certain requests are experiencing delays.

questions.explanation_vi: Việc so sánh độ trễ trung vị P50 (đại diện cho phản hồi thông thường) và P99 (đại diện cho phản hồi tệ nhất) giúp kỹ sư phát hiện ra các vấn đề về nghẽn tài nguyên hoặc hàng đợi khi có sự phân kỳ lớn giữa P99 và P50 trong các khu giờ cao điểm (Lựa chọn A).

questions.question:
A Machine Learning Engineer is developing a model deployment pattern for their entire company. Due to the sensitive nature of their datasets, their data scientists do not have access to production data in the prod catalog. Instead, they do their development work against a downsampled and desensitized dev catalog. Currently, they deploy models trained against the dev catalog directly to their production environment. Recently, a data scientist compared their model’s training metrics to the production metrics and noticed a large drop off in production performance.
Which change to the deployment process will minimize the difference between training and production data while maintaining their security standards?

choices.A: Use synthetic data generation to create a dev catalog that matches prod catalog statistical properties. Scientists train their model on the dev data and check their code into Git. After tests are passed, the model is deployed to production.
choices.B: The training and inference data must be the same. Grant data scientists read only access to the prod catalog for model training. Scientists train their model on the prod data and check their training and inference code into Git. After tests are passed, the model is deployed to production.
choices.C: Data scientists develop against the dev catalog. When ready, they check their code into Git. After tests are passed, the training code is run with user permissions against the production catalog. After training code execution, the model is deployed to production.
choices.D: Data scientists develop against the dev catalog. When ready, they check their code into Git. After tests are passed, the training code is run using a prod Service Principal’s permission against the production catalog. After training code execution, the model is deployed to production.

questions.explanation_vi: Để bảo mật dữ liệu sản xuất mà vẫn đảm bảo mô hình sản xuất không bị lệch dữ liệu, quy trình chuẩn là nhà khoa học dữ liệu phát triển mã trên tập dữ liệu dev, sau đó thông qua CI/CD chạy lại toàn bộ mã huấn luyện này bằng tài khoản Service Principal có quyền truy cập trực tiếp vào catalog production để tạo ra mô hình chạy trên production (Lựa chọn D).

questions.question:
A Machine Learning Engineer has deployed a classification fraud detection model with inference tables enabled. The model classifies credit card transactions as “fraud” or “legitimate”. The inference table includes a merchant_category feature, which contains four-digit codes that classify businesses by the type of goods or services they provide. After setting up a Lakehouse Monitor with an Inference Log profile, they notice two important findings from the monitoring results:
Overall model accuracy remains steady at 92%.The drift metrics show that the merchant_category feature has significant drift over the past month.
The engineer wants to determine if this feature drift is causing the model to perform worse on fraud detection specifically, not just overall performance.
Which metrics from the Lakehouse Monitor should they examine to make this determination?

choices.A: Check the overall accuracy metric in the profile metrics table and compare js_distance values for merchant_category in the drift metrics table.
choices.B: Look at precision and recall for the “fraud” class in the profile metrics table, and examine the ks_test_p_value for merchant_category in the drift metrics table.
choices.C: Analyze mean_prediction_probability across all classes in the profile metrics table and cross-reference with wasserstein_distance for merchant_category.
choices.D: Review prediction_count trends in the profile metrics table and validate using chi_square_test_p_value for merchant_category in the drift metrics table.

questions.explanation_vi: Để đánh giá xem dịch chuyển của cột `merchant_category` có ảnh hưởng cụ thể đến hiệu năng nhận diện lớp gian lận hay không, kỹ sư cần xem xét các chỉ số Precision và Recall riêng biệt của lớp 'fraud' trong bảng metrics và đối chiếu với giá trị p-value từ phép kiểm định Kolmogorov-Smirnov (ks_test) của cột đặc trưng đó (Lựa chọn B).

questions.question:
A Data Scientist needs to monitor a classification model deployed in production using Databricks Lakehouse Monitoring. The model predicts loan approvals, and the data scientist wants to check for bias by comparing model performance between applicants under 25 years old and those 25 or older. The inference logs are stored in a Delta table at loan_inference_log_path. The relevant columns are:
• age (integer)• prediction (integer: 1 for approved, 0 for denied)• label (integer: 1 for approved, 0 for denied)• timestamp (timestamp of inference)
The data scientist wants to evaluate fairness metrics such as predictive parity and equal opportunity for the protected group (age < 25) and detect drift in these metrics over weekly intervals.
Which code snippet correctly configures the monitor to evaluate drift and fairness metrics by age group?

choices.A: ![](https://cdn.examcademy.com/images/questions/1774859761425-e6l1idmy.png)
choices.B: ![](https://cdn.examcademy.com/images/questions/1774859763980-u35ofhij.png)
choices.C: ![](https://cdn.examcademy.com/images/questions/1774859766412-krnrk4fd.png)
choices.D: ![](https://cdn.examcademy.com/images/questions/1774859771537-e6v9qkti.png)

questions.explanation_vi: Lựa chọn A chứa đoạn mã cấu hình chính xác cho `create_monitor` để giám sát độ công bằng và chất lượng mô hình, trong đó sử dụng thuộc tính phân nhóm theo lát cắt dữ liệu tuổi tác (`slicing_exprs`) để tính toán độc lập các chỉ số đánh giá giữa nhóm được bảo vệ (age < 25) và nhóm còn lại.

questions.question:
A Data Scientist needs to develop a sales forecasting model to predict the sales of each store on a monthly basis. They have been asked to set up Lakehouse Monitoring so that the model can be evaluated for potential accuracy metrics, such as RMSE, on a daily basis. To do this, they will first set up Lakehouse Monitoring using the Inference profile type.
What is the next step in this process?

choices.A: Set the problem type to Classification and ensure that Change Data Feed is configured on the monitored tables.
choices.B: Set the problem type to Regression and appropriately set the Label Column, Prediction Column, and Model ID Column.
choices.C: Set the problem type to Regression and set the Baseline Table.
choices.D: Set the problem type to Classification and set the Baseline Table.

questions.explanation_vi: Để giám sát các chỉ số hồi quy (như RMSE cho bài toán dự báo doanh thu) hàng ngày sử dụng Inference monitor, bước tiếp theo là cấu hình kiểu bài toán là `Regression` và chỉ định chính xác các cột chứa nhãn thực tế (Label Column), cột chứa giá trị dự đoán (Prediction Column) và cột định danh mô hình (Lựa chọn B).

questions.question:
A Machine Learning Engineer has deployed a custom XGBoost model to a Databricks serving endpoint called “fraud-detection-v2” and needs to integrate it into three different systems: a real-time web application, a batch SQL analytics pipeline, and a Python microservice. Each system requires a different querying approach to maintain optimal performance and meet architectural constraints.
Which combination of querying methods is most appropriate for the three integration scenarios?

choices.A: Web application: ai_query function, SQL pipeline: REST API, Python microservice: MLflow Deployments SDK.
choices.B: Web application: REST API, SQL pipeline: ai_query function, Python microservice: MLflow Deployments SDK.
choices.C: Web application: REST API, SQL pipeline: MLflow Deployments SDK, Python microservice: ai_query function.
choices.D: Web application: MLflow Deployments SDK, SQL pipeline: ai_query function, Python microservice: REST API.

questions.explanation_vi: Lựa chọn B phân bổ chính xác các phương pháp gọi mô hình: ứng dụng web thời gian thực gọi qua REST API độ trễ thấp; pipeline phân tích bằng SQL gọi trực tiếp qua hàm `ai_query` của Databricks; và dịch vụ vi mô Python gọi thông qua thư viện MLflow Deployments SDK.

questions.question:
A Data Scientist has developed a PyTorch model and wants to use Ray for distributed hyperparameter optimization. They have access to a multi-node Databricks cluster and have configured the cluster to run Ray on Spark. They need to perform the distributed hyperparameter optimization with Ray with minimal setup.
Which approach will do this?

choices.A: Use Ray Task to perform the distributed optimization. Create a python function that contains the optimization logic and trigger multiple execution of the Task with the remote function.
choices.B: Use Ray Actor to perform the distributed optimization. Create a python class that contains the optimization logic and trigger multiple execution of the Actor with the remote function.
choices.C: Use Ray Tune to perform the distributed optimization. In ray.tune.tuner.Tuner method, add the tuning configuration such as search space and objective function as parameters.
choices.D: Use Ray Train to perform the distributed optimization. In ray.train.torch.TorchTrainer method, add the tuning configuration such as search space and objective function as parameters.

questions.explanation_vi: Thư viện `Ray Tune` là thành phần chuyên biệt của hệ sinh thái Ray hỗ trợ tối ưu hóa siêu tham số phân tán một cách đơn giản nhất thông qua lớp cấu hình `Tuner` (Lựa chọn C).

questions.question:
A Data Scientist at a local sports team has been asked to build a model that predicts the likelihood of each game selling out. The scientist has been given a training dataset in a Spark DataFrame called trainingDF and plans to use a series of two Transformers and one Estimator – T1, T2, and E1. The solution must be built using SparkML in Python and should be repeatable and maintainable, as it will be run frequently.
Which approach will accomplish this task?

choices.A: Use the MLlib DataFrame-based API:t1 = T1.transform(trainingDF)t2 = T2.transform(t1)model = E1.fit(t2)
choices.B: Use transform, as part of the MLlib DataFrame-based API:pipeline = transform(stages=[T1, T2, E1])model = pipeline.fit(trainingDF)
choices.C: Use the MLlib RDD-based API:pipeline = Pipeline(stages=[T1, T2, E1])model = pipeline.fit(toRdd())
choices.D: Use Pipelines, as part of the MLlib DataFrame-based API:pipeline = Pipeline(stages=[T1, T2, E1])model = pipeline.fit(trainingDF)

questions.explanation_vi: Cách tiếp cận chuẩn, dễ bảo trì và lặp lại trong SparkML là định nghĩa một đối tượng `Pipeline` chứa danh sách các công đoạn (`stages=[T1, T2, E1]`) và gọi phương thức `.fit(trainingDF)` để huấn luyện toàn bộ quy trình (Lựa chọn D).

questions.question:
A Machine Learning Engineer is developing a low-latency application that relies on up-to-date information from its data platform. The underlying dataset experiences heavy and frequent modifications – up to 60% of the records may be updated within a 5-minute window – and includes a mixture of inserts, updates and deletions. The process for applying these updates typically runs close to the 5-minute mark or even reaches it. The business also needs the application to reflect these changes in near real time. To keep latency low, the engineer wants to avoid waiting for scheduled batches and instead apply the updates as they come in. So, they have decided to implement their solution using an online table to make the updated data available to their application.
Which online table mode will support their use case?

choices.A: Snapshot
choices.B: Continuous
choices.C: Triggered
choices.D: Real-time

questions.explanation_vi: Khi bảng Delta nguồn có tần suất thay đổi rất cao và ứng dụng yêu cầu cập nhật liên tục ở chế độ gần như thời gian thực (near real-time), ta chọn chế độ đồng bộ hóa liên tục (`Continuous` sync mode) cho Online Table để phản ánh thay đổi lập tức (Lựa chọn B).

questions.question:
A Machine Learning Engineer needs to use Databricks to deploy a recommendation model. They want to ensure the model automatically retrains whenever significant data drift is detected in customer purchase patterns. The engineer has set up Lakehouse Monitoring to track data distribution and model accuracy metrics. The engineer wants to implement an automated retraining workflow that triggers based on these alerts.
Which approach will ensure the model is automatically retrained when data drift or performance degradation is detected?

choices.A: Configure SQL alerts on the monitoring tables to detect anomalies in data drift metrics, then use a webhook notification to trigger the existing model training job workflow.
choices.B: Schedule a daily batch job to retrain the model regardless of data changes to ensure freshness.
choices.C: Manually check the monitoring dashboards weekly and trigger retraining if performance degradation is observed.
choices.D: Use the APPEND mode to update the model registry with new versions without retraining.

questions.explanation_vi: Giải pháp tự động hóa kích hoạt huấn luyện lại mô hình tối ưu nhất là tạo một Databricks SQL Alert theo dõi bảng thống kê chất lượng để phát hiện lệch dữ liệu, sau đó cấu hình cảnh báo này gửi một thông báo Webhook để tự động chạy Job workflow huấn luyện lại mô hình (Lựa chọn A).

questions.question:
A Data Scientist is building a pipeline to train multiple machine learning models. They have a dataframe with a group column, many feature columns, and a single label column.
Their requirements include:
• Having an independent model per group• Using the data in the columns directly without transformation• Flexibility to choose from many different model types• Efficient distributed computing capabilities
They are choosing between using the pyspark.ml library and using pandas UDFs via groupby().ApplyInPandas() to train their models. They decide to select the groupBy().ApplyInPandas() method.
What is a valid reason for their selection?

choices.A: groupBy().ApplyInPandas() can encapsulate training models using a variety of python packages such as sklearn and PyTorch.
choices.B: A function used with groupBy().ApplyInPandas() can return any python object, including custom model objects.
choices.C: pyspark.ml models can have features defined as multiple input columns from a dataframe without transformation.
choices.D: The groupby().ApplyInPandas()strategy can handle arbitrarily large data in each group for the same worker node size due to its distribution strategy.

questions.explanation_vi: Một trong những ưu điểm lớn nhất của việc sử dụng `groupBy().applyInPandas()` là nó cho phép nhà khoa học dữ liệu chạy mã nguồn sử dụng bất kỳ thư viện Python tiêu chuẩn nào (như scikit-learn, PyTorch, XGBoost) trên các executor của Spark để huấn luyện mô hình cho từng nhóm một cách linh hoạt mà không bị giới hạn bởi các thuật toán của SparkML (Lựa chọn A).

questions.question:
A Machine Learning Engineer is using Databricks Asset Bundles (DABs) to configure a model serving endpoint.
Which two parameters are configurable? (Choose two.)

choices.A: max provisioned concurrency
choices.B: environment variables
choices.C: max latency
choices.D: CPU type

questions.explanation_vi: Trong tệp cấu hình Databricks Asset Bundles (DABs) để định nghĩa Model Serving Endpoint, các tham số như biến môi trường (`environment_variables`) và thời gian chờ cuộc gọi (`timeout_duration`) là các thuộc tính có thể cấu hình được (Lựa chọn B, E).

questions.question:
A Machine Learning Engineer has deployed a language model on Databricks Model Serving in their production workspace to create adaptive narratives that respond to player choices in a role playing game. The engineer has studied the game’s playerbase and calculated that the language model can take no more than 600ms to respond to players. They spread their game servers across North America to provide low latency for their playerbase. When the engineer reviews the game logs, they see over 15% of model responses exceed their latency budget of 600ms, however the model serving endpoint’s health metrics show a P99 latency of 580ms.
Why are players experiencing greater latency in game than that displayed in the endpoint health metrics’ P99 latency?

choices.A: P99 latency in endpoint health metric aggregates latency measurements across all models on the endpoint. There are other models served behind the endpoint that have lower latency than the language model, lowering the P99 latency metric.
choices.B: P99 latency in endpoint health metrics represents the average latency for 99% of requests. It is expected that close to half of requests will have greater latency than the P99 latency.
choices.C: P99 latency in endpoint health metrics doesn’t include network latency between the game servers and the endpoint. The network latency adds to the model latency, causing the in game latency to be greater than 600ms.
choices.D: P99 latency in endpoint health metrics is an approximation based on number of requests and model complexity. The engineers should use the game logs as the data source.

questions.explanation_vi: Chỉ số P99 hiển thị trên bảng điều khiển của endpoint chỉ ghi nhận thời gian xử lý nội bộ của mô hình tại endpoint mà không bao gồm thời gian truyền nhận dữ liệu qua mạng (network latency) giữa máy chủ trò chơi của người dùng và Databricks endpoint, làm cho độ trễ tổng thể thực tế mà người chơi trải nghiệm lớn hơn 600ms (Lựa chọn C).

questions.question:
A Data Scientist has trained a sentiment analysis model using Hugging Face Transformers. They wrap the model in a custom PyFunc to standardize prediction behavior across different inference platforms. The model includes a preprocessing script and a label encoder, both of which are saved alongside the model. They want to register the model in Unity Catalog and ensure all artifacts are tracked and reproducible.
Which action should they take?

choices.A: Save the model and artifacts locally, zip them, and upload the bundle to a Unity Catalog-managed volume for manual registration.
choices.B: Use mlflow.pyfunc.log_model() with a custom PythonModel class and specify the artifacts directory in the artifacts parameter, then register the model to a Unity Catalog-registered MLflow Model Registry.
choices.C: Use mlflow.log_artifact() to log all files, then load them back during scoring using relative file paths in the PyFunc wrapper.
choices.D: Log the PyFunc model using mlflow.pytorch.log_model(), then manually copy the artifacts to a Unity English Catalog volume.

questions.explanation_vi: Để đăng ký mô hình PyFunc tùy chỉnh cùng các tệp cấu hình bổ trợ vào Unity Catalog Model Registry, ta gọi hàm `mlflow.pyfunc.log_model()` truyền vào lớp `PythonModel` tùy chỉnh và danh sách các artifacts trong tham số `artifacts`, sau đó thực hiện đăng ký mô hình vào Registry của Unity Catalog (Lựa chọn B).

questions.question:
A Machine Learning Engineer has defined their model using Python notebooks in a Databricks Git folder and wants to set up unit tests as part of their CI/CD workflow. They want a workflow that is highly automated and easy to maintain.
Which strategy should they implement?

choices.A: Use the %sh and -m shell commands to call the unit test module inside the notebook.
choices.B: Use the web terminal to run unit tests in the source code before each commit.
choices.C: Use Databricks GitHub Actions to run notebook tests before each commit.
choices.D: Use the %run magic command to call the unit test module from another notebook.

questions.explanation_vi: Để tự động hóa và duy trì các bài kiểm thử đơn vị cho các notebook trong quy trình CI/CD một cách tối ưu, ta cấu hình các hành động tích hợp (như Databricks GitHub Actions hoặc CLI) để tự động chạy kiểm thử trước mỗi lần commit code (Lựa chọn C).

questions.question:
A Data Scientist is training a recommendation model based on customer data. The customer data (Terabytes of data) is located in various datasets and needs to be joined together and cleansed before training the model. The data scientist has determined that a deep learning model using PyTorch is the correct type of model to use for this use case. They want to prepare the data and train the model as quickly as possible.
Which approach should they use?

choices.A: Use Spark for joining and cleansing the data and Ray for training the deep learning model across multiple nodes.
choices.B: Use Pandas for joining and cleansing the data and Ray for training the deep learning model across multiple nodes.
choices.C: Use Ray for joining and cleansing the data and Spark for training the deep learning model across multiple nodes.
choices.D: Use Ray for both joining and cleansing the data and for training the deep learning model across multiple nodes.

questions.explanation_vi: Với lượng dữ liệu cực lớn ở quy mô terabyte, việc làm sạch và join dữ liệu nên được thực hiện bằng Spark để tận dụng tối đa hiệu năng tính toán phân tán. Sau đó, việc huấn luyện mô hình học sâu (PyTorch) phân tán được thực hiện tối ưu bằng thư viện Ray trên cụm nhiều node (Lựa chọn A).

questions.question:
A Machine Learning Engineer has trained a linear regression model using SparkML to predict loan default amounts. After generating predictions on the test dataset, they want to evaluate the model using multiple regression metrics simultaneously. The predictions DataFrame has columns prediction, label, and features. The engineer needs to calculate both RMSE and R-squared (R2) values to present comprehensive model performance results to stakeholders.
Which approach will do this?

choices.A: Create a RegressionEvaluator instance and set the parameter metricName to a list [‘rmse’, ‘r2’].
choices.B: Use a single RegressionEvaluator and call evaluate() twice with different parameter maps to override the metricName for each metric.
choices.C: Create a single RegressionEvaluator with metricName=“rmse” and use the model’s built-in summary statistics for R2.
choices.D: Use MulticlassClassificationEvaluator with metricName set to rmse and r2 respectively.

questions.explanation_vi: Để tính toán đồng thời nhiều chỉ số hồi quy (như RMSE và R2) từ một đối tượng `RegressionEvaluator` duy nhất, ta gọi phương thức `evaluate()` hai lần bằng cách truyền vào các tham số thay thế để ghi đè thuộc tính `metricName` cho từng chỉ số (Lựa chọn B).

questions.question:
A Machine Learning Engineer has developed a machine learning model training pipeline using multiple Databricks notebooks. Each notebook contains both feature engineering functions and embedded unit tests. The pipeline has shown promising results and is now being prepared for production deployment on Databricks. The engineer is now considering refactoring the code by moving all functions and tests into separate Python files within the Databricks workspace, while using notebooks primarily for orchestration and execution. They are aware of and want to take full advantage of Databricks’ architecture and MLOps capabilities.
Which advantage will this refactoring approach offer?

choices.A: Test suites will automatically execute when Python modules are imported into any Databricks notebook or job.
choices.B: Separate python files will automatically integrate with Databricks’ built-in automatic orchestration.
choices.C: The total number of files in the Databricks workspace will be reduced, simplifying project management.
choices.D: Functions in separate .py files can be version-controlled through Databricks Repos and reused across multiple notebooks and jobs.

questions.explanation_vi: Việc chuyển các hàm xử lý từ notebook sang các tệp module `.py` độc lập cho phép quản lý mã nguồn bằng Git thông qua Databricks Repos một cách hiệu quả, đồng thời hỗ trợ việc nhập (import) và tái sử dụng hàm trên nhiều notebook và công việc khác nhau (Lựa chọn D).

questions.question:
A Machine Learning Engineer is building a model using features derived from streaming clickstream data in Databricks. To ensure consistent feature values between training and real-time inference, the engineer must guarantee that features are computed in exactly the same way in both environments. They must also prevent offline-online skew in feature computation.
Which approach will fulfill these needs?

choices.A: Use an MLflow PyFunc model to encapsulate and reuse the exact same feature computation code during both training and inference.
choices.B: Cache features in-memory and use custom scripts to merge them at inference.
choices.C: Implement separate preprocessing pipelines for training and inference, keep documentation synchronized.
choices.D: Use batch-computed features for training but real-time-computed features at inference to match production performance.

questions.explanation_vi: Để loại bỏ hiện tượng lệch dữ liệu huấn luyện - suy luận (training-inference skew), thực hành tốt nhất là đóng gói trực tiếp mã nguồn tính toán đặc trưng vào trong một mô hình MLflow PyFunc để tái sử dụng chính xác cùng một logic tính toán đó cho cả hai môi trường (Lựa chọn A).

questions.question:
A Machine Learning Engineer has an MLOps process, using continuous integration, for deploying and promoting models into production. However, the process does not include any automated tests. This has led to many errors and low-quality models being deployed to production resulting in negative business outcomes. Their company has three environments: development, staging, and production.
The engineer now wants to incorporate unit and integration testing into the existing MLOps process to reduce the volume of errors and poor performing models making it to production. The integration of the tests should not slow down experimentation and should also catch potential issues as early as possible. Additionally, the tests should execute automatically.
At which point in the deployment pipeline should the CI/CD process automatically execute unit and integration tests to meet these requirements?

choices.A: Upon submitting a pull request to the staging environment, automatically execute the integration tests. Users are responsible for executing the unit tests before submitting the pull request.
choices.B: Upon submitting a pull request to the staging environment, automatically execute the unit tests. Configure the integration tests to automatically run against the staging environment once daily.
choices.C: Upon submitting a pull request to the staging environment, automatically execute the unit tests followed by the integration tests.
choices.D: Upon submitting a pull request to the production environment, automatically execute the unit tests. Configure the integration tests to run after the new code is deployed to the production environment.

questions.explanation_vi: Để phát hiện sớm các lỗi nghiệp vụ mà không làm chậm tốc độ thử nghiệm, quy trình CI/CD chuẩn nên tự động kích hoạt kiểm thử đơn vị (unit tests) trước, sau đó là kiểm thử tích hợp (integration tests) ngay khi kỹ sư gửi Pull Request (PR) để promote mã nguồn lên môi trường Staging (Lựa chọn C).

questions.question:
A Data Scientist has a feature table in Unity Catalog, named feature_table. To feature_table the data scientist executed a Python notebook that computes the features from the raw data in an upstream UC managed Delta Table and then stores them in feature_table. As new data comes in, it must be added to feature_table as quickly as possible while also retaining the existing features in the table. They would like to automate the updating of feature_table while also optimizing for cost. They have created this code in a notebook and want to automate the notebook on Databricks.
They will use the code in the notebook to update feature_table and then run the notebook as a job.
Which job approach will suit their goal and requirements?

choices.A: A job on an interactive cluster that has a scheduled trigger on it that runs the job daily at a set time.
choices.B: A job on automated compute that has a scheduled trigger on it that runs the job daily at a set time.
choices.C: A job on automated compute that has a table update trigger configured on the job.
choices.D: A Job on an interactive cluster that has a table update trigger configured on the job.

questions.explanation_vi: Để tự động hóa việc cập nhật bảng đặc trưng Unity Catalog một cách tiết kiệm chi phí nhất ngay khi dữ liệu nguồn thay đổi, ta thiết lập một Databricks Job chạy trên tài nguyên tính toán tự động co giãn (automated/job compute) và cấu hình trigger kích hoạt dựa trên sự kiện cập nhật bảng nguồn (table update trigger) (Lựa chọn C).

questions.question:
A Data Scientist is creating a MLlib Pipeline to predict customer churn. The data contains a categorical feature called vehicle_type and the Data Scientist wants to one-hot encode this feature for logistic regression models. During inference, the Pipeline must skip any rows containing an unseen category.
Which method will correctly transform the categorical feature?

choices.A: ![](https://cdn.examcademy.com/images/questions/1774859804475-5ecy15e8.png)
choices.B: ![](https://img.examtopics.com/certified-machine-learning-professional/image108.png)
choices.C: ![](https://cdn.examcademy.com/images/questions/1774859852024-y5u7o732.png)
choices.D: ![](https://cdn.examcademy.com/images/questions/1774859854235-6zjthku6.png)

questions.explanation_vi: Trong thư viện Spark ML, khi sử dụng bộ chuyển đổi một nóng (OneHotEncoder), ta thiết lập đối số `handleInvalid="keep"` hoặc cấu hình StringIndexer tương ứng với `handleInvalid="skip"` để bỏ qua các danh mục chưa từng xuất hiện trong tập huấn luyện khi chạy suy luận thực tế. Đoạn mã ở lựa chọn B biểu diễn đúng cấu hình này.

questions.question: Which of the following is a simple statistic to monitor for categorical feature drift?

choices.A: Mode
choices.B: None of these
choices.C: Mode, number of unique values, and percentage of missing values
choices.D: Percentage of missing values

questions.explanation_vi: Để giám sát sự dịch chuyển của các đặc trưng phân loại (categorical features) bằng các thống kê đơn giản, ta có thể theo dõi sự thay đổi của giá trị xuất hiện nhiều nhất (Mode), số lượng giá trị duy nhất (number of unique values) và tỷ lệ dữ liệu khuyết thiếu (percentage of missing values) (Lựa chọn C).
